  const [manualProjectId, setManualProjectId] = useState('');
  const [isProjectIdFrozen, setIsProjectIdFrozen] = useState(false);
  const [localSaveTxt, setLocalSaveTxt] = useState('');

  const update = (sec: string, key: string, value: any) => setData((d: any) => ({ ...d, [sec]: { ...d[sec], [key]: value } }));
  const handleLocalSave = (freeze: boolean) => { setIsProjectIdFrozen(freeze); setLocalSaveTxt(freeze ? 'تم التجميد' : 'تم الحفظ'); setTimeout(() => setLocalSaveTxt(''), 2000); };

  const submit = async () => {
    if (!data.pledge || !data.personal.fullName) return;
    setBusy(true);
    try {
      const projectRefId = await context.createProject({
        projectId: manualProjectId || '',
        beneficiaryName: data.personal.fullName,
        city: data.personal.city, neighborhood: data.personal.neighborhood, caseRef: data.caseRef,
        phase: 'RESEARCH', progressPct: 5, createdBy: user.id, data: { isProjectIdFrozen }
      });

      const f02Id = await api.createForm({ code: 'F-02', user, projectId: manualProjectId || '', projectRefId, beneficiaryName: data.personal.fullName, notes: data.researcher.opinion, data });

      if (f02Id) {
        // SPAWN THE ENTIRE MASTER CONTAINER ROADMAP AS DRAFTS (INCLUDES F-84)
        const allCodes: FormCode[] = [
          'F-03.1', 'F-03.2', 'F-04', 'F-08', 
          'F-18', 'F-22', 'F-21', 'F-20', 'F-84', // Phase 2
          'F-85', 'F-32', 'F-33', 'F-19',         // Phase 3
          'F-23',                                 // Phase 4
          'F-07', 'F-52'                          // Phase 5
        ];
        for (const code of allCodes) {
           await api.createForm({ code, user, projectId: manualProjectId || '', projectRefId, beneficiaryName: data.personal.fullName, status: 'draft' });
        }
        await api.createForm({ code: 'F-03', user, projectId: manualProjectId || '', projectRefId, beneficiaryName: data.personal.fullName, data: { f02Id }, status: 'pending' });
      }
      onClose();
    } finally { setBusy(false); }
  };

  const steps = ['شخصية', 'دخل وديون', 'الأسرة والسكن', 'الباحث والمرفقات'];

  return (
    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-2 sm:p-4" dir="rtl">
      <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-black/70 backdrop-blur-sm" onClick={onClose} />
      <div className="relative bg-[#050505] rounded-2xl shadow-2xl w-full max-w-4xl max-h-[95vh] overflow-hidden flex flex-col border border-gray-800">
        <div className="bg-gradient-to-l from-[#4A1F66] to-[#6B3D87] px-5 py-4 flex items-center justify-between text-white">
          <h2 className="font-bold">استمارة البحث الاجتماعي (F-02)</h2>
          <button onClick={onClose} className="p-1.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-white/15"><X className="w-5 h-5" /></button>
        </div>
        <div className="relative bg-gradient-to-br from-[#4A1F66] via-[#6B3D87] to-[#43bba1] p-5 text-white border-b border-[#6B3D87] shadow-sm">
           <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row items-start md:items-center justify-between gap-4">
              <div className="flex-1">
                 <h1 className="text-xl font-black mb-1">{data.personal.fullName || 'اسم المستفيد...'}</h1>
                 <p className="text-white/80 text-xs flex items-center gap-1.5"><MapPin className="w-3 h-3" /> {data.personal.city || 'المدينة...'} {data.personal.neighborhood ? `· ${data.personal.neighborhood}` : ''}</p>
              </div>
              <div className="bg-white/10 p-3 rounded-xl border border-white/20 backdrop-blur-md w-full md:w-auto min-w-[260px]">
                 <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-2">
                   <label className="text-xs font-bold text-white/80">رقم المشروع</label>
                   {localSaveTxt && <span className="text-[10px] text-[#43bba1] font-bold bg-[#05110e] px-2 py-0.5 rounded">{localSaveTxt}</span>}
                 </div>
                 <div className="flex flex-col gap-2">
                   <input value={manualProjectId} onChange={e => setManualProjectId(e.target.value)} disabled={isProjectIdFrozen} placeholder="أدخل رقم المشروع (اختياري)..." className="w-full px-3 py-1.5 bg-black/30 border border-white/20 rounded-lg text-white font-bold outline-none focus:border-[#43bba1] transition text-sm disabled:opacity-60" />
                   <div className="flex gap-2">
                     <button onClick={() => handleLocalSave(false)} disabled={isProjectIdFrozen} className="flex-1 bg-white/20 hover:bg-white/30 text-white py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs font-bold transition disabled:opacity-50">حفظ مؤقت</button>
                     <button onClick={() => handleLocalSave(true)} disabled={isProjectIdFrozen} className="flex-[2] bg-gradient-to-r from-[#43bba1] to-[#359d86] text-black py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs font-bold flex items-center justify-center gap-1.5 shadow-md disabled:opacity-50">
                       {isProjectIdFrozen ? <Lock className="w-3.5 h-3.5" /> : <CheckCircle2 className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />} {isProjectIdFrozen ? 'مُجمد' : 'تأكيد وتجميد'}
                     </button>
                   </div>
                 </div>
              </div>
           </div>
        </div>
        <div className="px-5 py-3 border-b border-gray-800 flex gap-2 overflow-x-auto bg-[#0a0a0a]">
          {steps.map((s, i) => <button key={i} onClick={() => setStep(i)} className={`flex-1 min-w-[120px] py-2 px-2 rounded-lg text-xs font-bold transition-all ${i === step ? 'bg-[#1a0f2e] text-[#a871f7] border border-[#3c1d5d]' : 'text-gray-500 hover:bg-[#111]'}`}>{i + 1}. {s}</button>)}
        </div>
        <div className="overflow-y-auto p-5 flex-1 space-y-4 text-gray-200">
          {step === 0 && (
            <div className="bg-[#0c0c0c] border border-gray-800 rounded-xl p-5">
              <h3 className="text-[#43bba1] font-bold mb-4 flex items-center gap-2"><UsersIcon className="w-5 h-5"/> البيانات الشخصية</h3>
              <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                <Input label="الاسم الرباعي *" required value={data.personal.fullName} onChange={e => update('personal', 'fullName', e.target.value)} />
                <Input label="رقم الهوية (10 أرقام) *" required value={data.personal.idNumber} onChange={e => update('personal', 'idNumber', e.target.value)} />
                <Select label="المدينة *" options={DEFAULT_LISTS.cities} value={data.personal.city} onChange={e => update('personal', 'city', e.target.value)} />
              </div>
            </div>
          )}
          {step === 3 && (
            <div className="bg-[#0c0c0c] border border-gray-800 rounded-xl p-5">
               <h3 className="text-[#43bba1] font-bold mb-4 flex items-center gap-2"><Activity className="w-5 h-5"/> الباحث الاجتماعي</h3>
               <Input label="اسم الباحث *" value={data.researcher.name} onChange={e => update('researcher', 'name', e.target.value)} />
               <TextArea className="mt-4" label="رأي الباحث في الحالة **" rows={3} value={data.researcher.opinion} onChange={e => update('researcher', 'opinion', e.target.value)} />
               <label className="flex items-center gap-2 mt-6 cursor-pointer bg-[#111] p-4 rounded-lg border border-gray-800">
                  <input type="checkbox" checked={data.pledge} onChange={e => setData((d:any) => ({...d, pledge: e.target.checked}))} className="w-5 h-5 accent-[#43bba1]" />
                  <span className="text-sm font-bold text-white">أُقرّ بصحة البيانات الميدانية والمستندات المرفقة، وبناءً عليه يتم إنشاء مسار المشروع.</span>
               </label>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
        <div className="border-t border-gray-800 p-4 flex items-center justify-between bg-[#0a0a0a]">
          <button onClick={() => setStep(s => Math.max(0, s - 1))} className="text-[#a871f7] font-bold text-sm">السابق</button>
          {step < 3 ? <button onClick={() => setStep(s => s + 1)} className="px-6 py-2 bg-[#1a0f2e] text-[#a871f7] border border-[#3c1d5d] rounded-lg text-sm font-bold">التالي</button>
          : <button onClick={submit} disabled={busy || !data.pledge} className="px-6 py-2 bg-gradient-to-r from-[#43bba1] to-[#359d86] text-black rounded-lg text-sm font-bold disabled:opacity-50 flex items-center gap-2"><Send className="w-4 h-4" /> رفع وتوليد المشروع</button>}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

export const F02Renderer: FormRenderer = ({ rec }) => {
  const d = rec.data || {};
  return (
    <div className="space-y-4">
      <div className="bg-[#0c0c0c] border border-gray-800 rounded-xl p-5">
        <h3 className="text-[#43bba1] font-bold mb-4 flex items-center gap-2"><UsersIcon className="w-5 h-5"/> البيانات الشخصية للمستفيد</h3>
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
          <ReadOnlyField label="الاسم الكامل" value={d.personal?.fullName} />
          <ReadOnlyField label="رقم الهوية" value={d.personal?.idNumber} />
          <ReadOnlyField label="المدينة" value={d.personal?.city} />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div className="bg-[#0c0c0c] border border-gray-800 rounded-xl p-5">
        <h3 className="text-[#43bba1] font-bold mb-4 flex items-center gap-2"><Activity className="w-5 h-5"/> رأي الباحث الميداني</h3>
        <ReadOnlyField label="التوصية" value={d.researcher?.opinion} />
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

// ============================================================================
// F-03: RESEARCH MANAGER APPROVAL
// ============================================================================
export const F03Renderer: FormRenderer = ({ rec, user, api }) => {
  const [eligibility, setEligibility] = useState(rec.data?.eligibility || '');
  const [managerNotes, setManagerNotes] = useState(rec.data?.managerNotes || '');
  const [busy, setBusy] = useState(false);
  
  const f02 = api.forms.find(f => f.id === rec.data?.f02Id);
  const awaitsMe = formAwaitsUser(rec, user) && user.role === 'RESEARCH_MANAGER';

  const act = async (decision: 'approved' | 'rejected') => {
    setBusy(true);
    const patch = { eligibility, managerNotes };
    if (decision === 'approved') await api.approveForm(rec.id, user, 'معتمد', patch);
    else await api.rejectForm(rec.id, user, 'مرفوض للتعديل', patch);
    
    const f031 = api.forms.find(f => f.code === 'F-03.1' && f.projectRefId === rec.projectRefId);
    if (f031) { await api.updateFormData(f031.id, { managerNotes }); await api.activateForm(f031.id); }
    setBusy(false);
  };

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      <div className="bg-[#0c0c0c] border border-gray-800 rounded-xl p-5 shadow-sm">
        <h3 className="text-[#43bba1] font-bold mb-4 flex items-center gap-2"><FileText className="w-5 h-5"/> بيانات دراسة الحالة (للقراءة فقط)</h3>
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
          <ReadOnlyField label="رقم الحالة" value={f02?.data?.caseRef} />
          <ReadOnlyField label="اسم المستفيد" value={rec.beneficiaryName} />
          <ReadOnlyField label="المدينة" value={f02?.data?.personal?.city} />
          <div className="md:col-span-3">
            <ReadOnlyField label="رأي الباحث الميداني" value={f02?.data?.researcher?.opinion} />
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div className="bg-[#0c0c0c] border border-gray-800 rounded-xl p-5 shadow-sm">
        <h3 className="text-[#43bba1] font-bold mb-4 flex items-center gap-2"><UserCog className="w-5 h-5"/> قرار مدير البحث الاجتماعي</h3>
        <label className="block text-sm font-bold text-gray-400 mb-3">الاستحقاق المبدئي:</label>
        <div className="flex gap-4 mb-5">
          <label className="flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer text-gray-200"><input disabled={!awaitsMe} type="radio" checked={eligibility === 'مستحق'} onChange={() => setEligibility('مستحق')} className="w-4 h-4 accent-[#43bba1]" /> مستحق</label>
          <label className="flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer text-gray-200"><input disabled={!awaitsMe} type="radio" checked={eligibility === 'غير مستحق'} onChange={() => setEligibility('غير مستحق')} className="w-4 h-4 accent-[#43bba1]" /> غير مستحق</label>
        </div>
        <TextArea disabled={!awaitsMe} label="توصية المدير" rows={3} value={managerNotes} onChange={e => setManagerNotes(e.target.value)} placeholder="اكتب توصيتك أو أسباب الإرجاع هنا..." />
        {awaitsMe && (
          <div className="flex gap-3 mt-6 pt-4 border-t border-gray-800">
            <button onClick={() => act('rejected')} disabled={busy} className="flex-1 bg-[#1a1a1a] hover:bg-[#222] border border-gray-700 text-white py-3 rounded-lg font-bold text-sm flex justify-center items-center gap-2"><RefreshCcw size={18} /> إرجاع للباحث</button>
            <button onClick={() => act('approved')} disabled={busy || !eligibility} className="flex-[2] bg-[#43bba1] hover:bg-[#359d86] text-black py-3 rounded-lg font-bold text-sm flex justify-center items-center gap-2 disabled:opacity-50"><CheckCircle2 size={18} /> إعتماد ورفع للمدير التنفيذي</button>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

// ============================================================================
// F-03.1: EXECUTIVE DIRECTOR APPROVAL
// ============================================================================
export const F031Renderer: FormRenderer = ({ rec, user, api }) => {
  const [execNotes, setExecNotes] = useState(rec.data?.execNotes || '');
  const [busy, setBusy] = useState(false);
  const awaitsMe = formAwaitsUser(rec, user) && user.role === 'EXEC_DIRECTOR';

  const act = async (decision: 'approved' | 'rejected') => {
    setBusy(true);
    const patch = { execNotes, execDecision: decision };
    if (decision === 'approved') await api.approveForm(rec.id, user, 'موافقة وتعميد', patch);
    else await api.rejectForm(rec.id, user, 'مرفوض', patch);

    const f032 = api.forms.find(f => f.code === 'F-03.2' && f.projectRefId === rec.projectRefId);
    if (f032) { await api.updateFormData(f032.id, { execNotes, execDecision: decision, managerNotes: rec.data?.managerNotes }); await api.activateForm(f032.id); }
    setBusy(false);
  };

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
         <ReadOnlyField label="رقم الحالة" value={rec.data?.caseRef || '-'} />
         <ReadOnlyField label="الاستحقاق ورأي الإدارة" value={rec.data?.managerNotes || 'لا توجد ملاحظات من الإدارة'} />
      </div>
      <div className="bg-[#0c0c0c] border border-gray-800 rounded-xl p-5 shadow-sm">
        <h3 className="text-[#43bba1] font-bold mb-4 flex items-center gap-2"><UserCheck className="w-5 h-5"/> قرار المدير التنفيذي</h3>
        <TextArea disabled={!awaitsMe} label="توصية المدير التنفيذي" rows={3} value={execNotes} onChange={e => setExecNotes(e.target.value)} placeholder="اكتب ملاحظاتك وقرارك هنا..." />
        {awaitsMe && (
          <div className="flex gap-3 mt-6 pt-4 border-t border-gray-800">
            <button onClick={() => act('approved')} disabled={busy} className="flex-1 bg-gradient-to-r from-[#43bba1] to-[#359d86] text-black py-3 rounded-lg font-bold text-sm flex justify-center items-center gap-2"><CheckCircle2 size={18} /> موافقة (Approve)</button>
            <button onClick={() => act('rejected')} disabled={busy} className="flex-1 bg-[#3a1515] border border-[#5c2121] text-red-400 hover:bg-[#5c2121]/50 py-3 rounded-lg font-bold text-sm flex justify-center items-center gap-2"><XCircle size={18} /> رفض (Disapprove)</button>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

// ============================================================================
// F-03.2: FINAL TRANSFER (RESEARCH MANAGER)
// ============================================================================
export const F032Renderer: FormRenderer = ({ rec, user, api }) => {
  const [transferNotes, setTransferNotes] = useState(rec.data?.transferNotes || '');
  const [newManagerNotes, setNewManagerNotes] = useState('');
  const [busy, setBusy] = useState(false);
  const awaitsMe = formAwaitsUser(rec, user) && user.role === 'RESEARCH_MANAGER';
  const isRejectedByExec = rec.data?.execDecision === 'rejected';

  const transferToProjects = async () => {
    setBusy(true);
    await api.approveForm(rec.id, user, 'إحالة للمشاريع', { transferNotes, finalManagerNotes: rec.data?.managerNotes });
    const f04 = api.forms.find(f => f.code === 'F-04' && f.projectRefId === rec.projectRefId);
    if (f04) { await api.updateFormData(f04.id, { transferNotes }); await api.activateForm(f04.id); }
    setBusy(false);
  };

  const closeProject = async () => {
    setBusy(true);
    await api.approveForm(rec.id, user, 'تم الإغلاق للرفض', { projectStatus: 'CLOSED_REJECTED' });
    setBusy(false);
  };

  const returnToResearcher = async () => {
    setBusy(true);
    await api.rejectForm(rec.id, user, 'إعادة للباحث بناء على قرار التنفيذي');
    setBusy(false);
  };

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      <div className={`border p-4 rounded-xl mb-4 ${isRejectedByExec ? 'bg-[#3a1515] border-red-500/30' : 'bg-[#05110e] border-[#43bba1]/30'}`}>
         <h3 className={`font-bold text-sm mb-1 flex items-center gap-2 ${isRejectedByExec ? 'text-red-400' : 'text-[#43bba1]'}`}><UserCheck className="w-4 h-4" /> قرار المدير التنفيذي: {isRejectedByExec ? 'تم الرفض' : 'تمت الموافقة'}</h3>
         <p className="text-gray-300 text-xs">{rec.data?.execNotes || 'بدون ملاحظات'}</p>
      </div>

      <div className="bg-[#0c0c0c] border border-gray-800 rounded-xl p-5 shadow-sm">
        <h3 className="text-[#43bba1] font-bold mb-4 flex items-center gap-2"><ArrowLeftRight className="w-5 h-5"/> الإجراء النهائي للإحالة</h3>
        {isRejectedByExec ? (
          <>
            <p className="text-sm text-gray-400 mb-4 font-semibold">المشروع مرفوض من الإدارة. يرجى إما إغلاق المشروع نهائياً أو إعادته للباحث لاستكمال النواقص.</p>
            <TextArea disabled={!awaitsMe} label="توصية مدير البحث الاجتماعي" rows={2} value={newManagerNotes} onChange={e => setNewManagerNotes(e.target.value)} />
            {awaitsMe && (
              <div className="flex gap-3 mt-6 pt-4 border-t border-gray-800">
                <button onClick={closeProject} disabled={busy} className="flex-1 bg-gray-800 text-white py-3 rounded-lg font-bold text-sm flex justify-center items-center gap-2"><XCircle size={18} /> إغلاق المشروع</button>
                <button onClick={returnToResearcher} disabled={busy} className="flex-1 bg-[#4A1F66] text-white hover:bg-[#3A1652] py-3 rounded-lg font-bold text-sm flex justify-center items-center gap-2"><RefreshCcw size={18} /> إعادة إلى الباحث الاجتماعي</button>
              </div>
            )}
          </>
        ) : (
          <>
            <p className="text-sm text-gray-400 mb-4 font-semibold">المشروع جاهز للتحويل إلى إدارة المشاريع للبدء بالتشخيص الهندسي.</p>
            <TextArea disabled={!awaitsMe} label="ملاحظات الإحالة للمشاريع (تنتقل لكراسة التشخيص)" rows={2} value={transferNotes} onChange={e => setTransferNotes(e.target.value)} />
            {awaitsMe && (
              <button onClick={transferToProjects} disabled={busy} className="w-full mt-6 bg-gradient-to-r from-[#502b79] to-[#3c1d5d] hover:from-[#603590] text-white py-4 rounded-xl font-bold text-base flex justify-center items-center gap-2 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(80,43,121,0.4)]">
                <ArrowLeftRight size={20} /> اعتماد وإحالة إلى إدارة المشاريع
              </button>
            )}
          </>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

// ============================================================================
// F-04: ASSIGN DIAGNOSIS ENGINEER (PHASE 2 START)
// ============================================================================
export const F04Renderer: FormRenderer = ({ rec, user, api, users, context }) => {
  const [engineerId, setEngineerId] = useState(rec.data?.engineerId || '');
  const [headNotes, setHeadNotes] = useState(rec.data?.headNotes || '');
  const [showHistory, setShowHistory] = useState(false);
  const [busy, setBusy] = useState(false);
  const awaitsMe = formAwaitsUser(rec, user) && user.role === 'HEAD_DIAGNOSIS';

  const f032 = api.forms.find(f => f.code === 'F-03.2' && f.projectRefId === rec.projectRefId);
  const f031 = api.forms.find(f => f.code === 'F-03.1' && f.projectRefId === rec.projectRefId);
  const f03 = api.forms.find(f => f.code === 'F-03' && f.projectRefId === rec.projectRefId);
  const f02 = api.forms.find(f => f.code === 'F-02' && f.projectRefId === rec.projectRefId);

  const latestNote = f032?.data?.transferNotes || f032?.data?.managerNotes || 'لا توجد توصية متوفرة';
  const transferDate = f032?.updatedAt ? new Date(f032.updatedAt).toLocaleDateString('ar-SA') : 'غير متوفر';
  const engineers = users.filter(u => u.role === 'DIAGNOSIS_ENGINEER' && u.status === 'active');

  const submit = async () => {
    setBusy(true);
    await api.approveForm(rec.id, user, 'تم التكليف للتشخيص', { engineerId, headNotes });
    if (rec.projectRefId) {
      await context.updateProject(rec.projectRefId, { diagnosisEngineerId: engineerId });
      const f08 = api.forms.find(f => f.code === 'F-08' && f.projectRefId === rec.projectRefId);
      if (f08) await api.activateForm(f08.id, engineerId);
    }
    setBusy(false);
  };

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6 animate-fade-in">
      <Card title="ملاحظات وتوصيات الإحالة" icon={Activity}>
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4 mb-4">
          <ReadOnlyField label="تاريخ الإحالة" value={transferDate} />
          <ReadOnlyField label="آخر توصية (مدير البحث)" value={latestNote} highlight />
        </div>
        <div className="border border-gray-800 rounded-xl overflow-hidden mt-4">
          <button type="button" onClick={() => setShowHistory(!showHistory)} className="w-full bg-[#111] hover:bg-[#1a1a1a] text-[#43bba1] text-xs font-bold py-2.5 px-4 flex items-center justify-between transition">
            <span>عرض السجل الكامل للتوصيات (تتبع المسار)</span>{showHistory ? <ChevronUp size={16} /> : <ChevronDown size={16} />}
          </button>
          {showHistory && (
            <div className="p-4 bg-[#050505] space-y-3">
              <ReadOnlyField label="رأي الباحث الميداني (F-02)" value={f02?.data?.researcher?.opinion} />
              <ReadOnlyField label="توصية مدير البحث المبدئية (F-03)" value={f03?.data?.managerNotes} />
              <ReadOnlyField label="توصية المدير التنفيذي (F-03.1)" value={f031?.data?.execNotes} />
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      </Card>

      <Card title="توجيه الزيارة الميدانية" icon={UserCog}>
        <p className="text-sm text-gray-400 mb-4 leading-relaxed">يرجى اختيار المهندس المسؤول لزيارة التشخيص لفتح كراسة التقييم. بمجرد التكليف، سيتم إشعار المهندس تلقائياً لفتح كراسة (F-08).</p>
        <div className="space-y-4">
          <Select disabled={!awaitsMe} label="اختر مهندس ومشرف التشخيص *" required options={engineers.map(e => ({ value: e.id, label: e.fullName }))} value={engineerId} onChange={e => setEngineerId(e.target.value)} />
          <TextArea disabled={!awaitsMe} label="توصية رئيس قسم التشخيص" rows={2} value={headNotes} onChange={e => setHeadNotes(e.target.value)} />
        </div>
        {awaitsMe && (
          <div className="mt-6 border-t border-gray-800 pt-5 text-right">
             <button disabled={!engineerId || busy} onClick={submit} className="w-full md:w-auto px-8 py-3.5 rounded-xl text-sm font-bold text-black bg-gradient-to-r from-[#43bba1] to-[#359d86] hover:from-[#50d1b5] transition-all disabled:opacity-50 shadow-md">تكليف المهندس وإشعار النظام</button>
          </div>
        )}
      </Card>
    </div>
  );
};

// ============================================================================
// F-08: DIAGNOSIS (4-Slides)
// ============================================================================
export const F08Renderer: FormRenderer = ({ rec, user, api }) => {
  const [step, setStep] = useState(0);
  const [busy, setBusy] = useState(false);
  const awaitsMe = formAwaitsUser(rec, user);

  const [data, setData] = useState(rec.data || {
    visitDate: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0], type: 'منزل', area: '', age: '', summary: '',
    immediateEvac: false, noEvacuation: false,
    works: [],
    furnitureItems: { bed1: 0, carpet: 0, sofaMeters: 0, wardrobe4: 0 }, 
    appliances: { acSplit1: 0, washer: 0, fridge: 0, stove: 0 }, 
    diagnosisNotes: '', pledge: false
  });

  const steps = ['الأساسية', 'حصر الأعمال', 'الأثاث والأجهزة', 'الاعتماد والرفع'];

  const addWorkSpace = () => {
    setData((prev:any) => ({ ...prev, works: [...prev.works, {
      id: Date.now(), name: '', isExpanded: true, images: [],
      civil: { concrete: '', roof: '', insulation: '', ceramic: '', paint: '', plaster: '', wood: '', aluminum: '' },
      electrical: { panel: 0, ceilingLight: 0, spotlight: 0, sockets: 0 },
      plumbing: { toiletFr: 0, toiletAr: 0, heater: 0, sink: 0 }
    }]}));
  };

  const removeWorkSpace = (id: number) => setData((prev:any) => ({ ...prev, works: prev.works.filter((w:any) => w.id !== id) }));
  const toggleExpand = (id: number) => setData((prev:any) => ({ ...prev, works: prev.works.map((w:any) => w.id === id ? { ...w, isExpanded: !w.isExpanded } : w) }));
  const updateWorkSpace = (id: number, category: string|null, field: string, value: any) => setData((prev:any) => ({ ...prev, works: prev.works.map((w:any) => {
    if (w.id === id) { if (category) return { ...w, [category]: { ...w[category], [field]: value } }; return { ...w, [field]: value }; } return w;
  })}));

  const updateNestedData = (section: string, field: string, value: any) => setData((prev:any) => ({ ...prev, [section]: { ...prev[section], [field]: value } }));

  const submit = async () => {
    setBusy(true);
    await api.approveForm(rec.id, user, 'تم التشخيص وحصر الكميات', data);
    setBusy(false);
  };

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6 animate-fade-in">
      <div className="px-5 py-3 rounded-xl border border-gray-800 flex gap-2 overflow-x-auto bg-[#0a0a0a]">
        {steps.map((s, i) => <button key={i} onClick={() => setStep(i)} className={`flex-1 min-w-[120px] py-2 px-2 rounded-lg text-xs font-bold transition-all ${i === step ? 'bg-[#1a0f2e] text-[#a871f7] border border-[#3c1d5d]' : 'text-gray-500 hover:bg-[#111]'}`}>{s}</button>)}
      </div>

      {step === 0 && (
        <Card title="بيانات الزيارة والتقييم המبدئي" icon={HomeIcon}>
          <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4 mb-4">
            <Input disabled={!awaitsMe} label="تاريخ الزيارة" type="date" value={data.visitDate} onChange={(e:any) => setData({...data, visitDate: e.target.value})} />
            <Select disabled={!awaitsMe} label="نوع المبنى" options={['منزل', 'شقة', 'فيلا', 'شعبي']} value={data.type} onChange={(e:any) => setData({...data, type: e.target.value})} />
            <Input disabled={!awaitsMe} label="المساحة التقريبية" value={data.area} onChange={(e:any) => setData({...data, area: e.target.value})} />
            <Input disabled={!awaitsMe} label="العمر التقديري" value={data.age} onChange={(e:any) => setData({...data, age: e.target.value})} />
          </div>

          <div className={`mt-4 p-4 rounded-xl flex items-start gap-3 transition-all border-2 ${data.immediateEvac ? 'bg-[#3a1515] border-red-500/50' : 'bg-[#0a0a0a] border-gray-800'}`}>
            <input disabled={!awaitsMe} type="checkbox" checked={data.immediateEvac} onChange={(e) => setData({ ...data, immediateEvac: e.target.checked, noEvacuation: false })} className="w-5 h-5 mt-1 rounded accent-red-600 cursor-pointer" />
            <label className="cursor-pointer select-none">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm font-bold text-red-500"><AlertTriangle size={18} /> تنبيه: المبنى آيل للسقوط عالي الخطورة، بحاجة إلى إخلاء فوري</div>
            </label>
          </div>

          <div className={`mt-4 p-4 rounded-xl flex items-start gap-3 transition-all border-2 ${data.noEvacuation ? 'bg-[#05110e] border-[#43bba1]/50' : 'bg-[#0a0a0a] border-gray-800'}`}>
            <input disabled={!awaitsMe} type="checkbox" checked={data.noEvacuation} onChange={(e) => setData({ ...data, noEvacuation: e.target.checked, immediateEvac: false })} className="w-5 h-5 mt-1 rounded accent-[#43bba1] cursor-pointer" />
            <label className="cursor-pointer select-none">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm font-bold text-[#43bba1]">المبنى لا يحتاج إلى إخلاء</div>
            </label>
          </div>

          <TextArea disabled={!awaitsMe} className="mt-4" label="ملخص تقييم المبنى" rows={3} value={data.summary} onChange={(e:any) => setData({...data, summary: e.target.value})} />
        </Card>
      )}

      {step === 1 && (
        <Card title="حصر كميات الأعمال (البنود المبدئية)" icon={ClipboardList}>
          <div className="space-y-4">
            {data.works.length === 0 ? (
              <div className="bg-[#050505] p-8 rounded-xl text-center border-2 border-dashed border-gray-800">
                <ClipboardList className="w-12 h-12 text-[#502b79] mx-auto mb-3" />
                <h3 className="text-sm font-bold text-gray-400 mb-1">لا توجد مساحات مضافة</h3>
                {awaitsMe && <button onClick={addWorkSpace} className="mt-4 mx-auto bg-[#1a0f2e] text-[#a871f7] border border-[#3c1d5d] px-5 py-2.5 rounded-lg text-sm font-bold flex items-center gap-2"><Plus className="w-4 h-4" /> إضافة مساحة (غرفة، مطبخ..)</button>}
              </div>
            ) : (
              data.works.map((space:any, index:number) => (
                <div key={space.id} className="bg-[#0c0c0c] rounded-xl border border-gray-800 overflow-hidden shadow-sm">
                  <div className="bg-[#111] border-b border-gray-800 p-3 flex items-center justify-between gap-3">
                    <div className="flex-1 flex items-center gap-2">
                      <button onClick={() => toggleExpand(space.id)} className="p-1.5 text-gray-400 hover:text-white bg-[#050505] rounded-md border border-gray-800">
                        {space.isExpanded ? <ChevronUp className="w-4 h-4" /> : <ChevronDown className="w-4 h-4" />}
                      </button>
                      <span className="font-bold text-[#a871f7] text-sm ml-1">{index + 1}.</span>
                      <input disabled={!awaitsMe} type="text" placeholder="اسم المساحة (مثال: غرفة النوم 1)" value={space.name} onChange={(e) => updateWorkSpace(space.id, null, 'name', e.target.value)} className="w-full md:w-1/2 text-sm font-bold bg-[#050505] border border-gray-800 rounded px-3 py-1.5 focus:border-[#43bba1] text-white outline-none" />
                    </div>
                    {awaitsMe && <button onClick={() => removeWorkSpace(space.id)} className="text-red-500 hover:bg-[#3a1515] p-2 rounded-lg"><Trash2 className="w-4 h-4" /></button>}
                  </div>
                  <div className={`${space.isExpanded ? 'block' : 'hidden'} p-5 space-y-6`}>
                      <h4 className="text-sm font-bold text-[#43bba1] mb-3 border-b border-gray-800 pb-2">الأعمال المدنية والتشطيبات</h4>
                      <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-3 mb-5">
                        <Input disabled={!awaitsMe} label="خرسانة" value={space.civil.concrete} onChange={(e:any) => updateWorkSpace(space.id, 'civil', 'concrete', e.target.value)} />
                        <Input disabled={!awaitsMe} label="أسقف" value={space.civil.roof} onChange={(e:any) => updateWorkSpace(space.id, 'civil', 'roof', e.target.value)} />
                        <Input disabled={!awaitsMe} label="عزل" value={space.civil.insulation} onChange={(e:any) => updateWorkSpace(space.id, 'civil', 'insulation', e.target.value)} />
                        <Input disabled={!awaitsMe} label="سيراميك" value={space.civil.ceramic} onChange={(e:any) => updateWorkSpace(space.id, 'civil', 'ceramic', e.target.value)} />
                      </div>
                      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
                        <div className="bg-[#111] p-4 rounded-xl border border-gray-800">
                          <h4 className="text-sm font-bold text-[#43bba1] mb-3 border-b border-gray-800 pb-2">أعمال الكهرباء</h4>
                          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-3">
                            <NumberCounter disabled={!awaitsMe} label="لوح/بريكر" value={space.electrical.panel} onChange={(v:any) => updateWorkSpace(space.id, 'electrical', 'panel', v)} />
                            <NumberCounter disabled={!awaitsMe} label="مصباح مستعار" value={space.electrical.ceilingLight} onChange={(v:any) => updateWorkSpace(space.id, 'electrical', 'ceilingLight', v)} />
                            <NumberCounter disabled={!awaitsMe} label="سبوت لايت" value={space.electrical.spotlight} onChange={(v:any) => updateWorkSpace(space.id, 'electrical', 'spotlight', v)} />
                            <NumberCounter disabled={!awaitsMe} label="أفياش عادية" value={space.electrical.sockets} onChange={(v:any) => updateWorkSpace(space.id, 'electrical', 'sockets', v)} />
                          </div>
                        </div>
                        <div className="bg-[#111] p-4 rounded-xl border border-gray-800">
                          <h4 className="text-sm font-bold text-[#43bba1] mb-3 border-b border-gray-800 pb-2">أعمال السباكة</h4>
                          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-3">
                            <NumberCounter disabled={!awaitsMe} label="كرسي إفرنجي" value={space.plumbing.toiletFr} onChange={(v:any) => updateWorkSpace(space.id, 'plumbing', 'toiletFr', v)} />
                            <NumberCounter disabled={!awaitsMe} label="كرسي عربي" value={space.plumbing.toiletAr} onChange={(v:any) => updateWorkSpace(space.id, 'plumbing', 'toiletAr', v)} />
                            <NumberCounter disabled={!awaitsMe} label="سخانة" value={space.plumbing.heater} onChange={(v:any) => updateWorkSpace(space.id, 'plumbing', 'heater', v)} />
                            <NumberCounter disabled={!awaitsMe} label="مغاسل خزف" value={space.plumbing.sink} onChange={(v:any) => updateWorkSpace(space.id, 'plumbing', 'sink', v)} />
                          </div>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              ))
            )}
            {awaitsMe && data.works.length > 0 && <button onClick={addWorkSpace} className="w-full bg-[#050505] border border-dashed border-[#502b79] text-[#a871f7] py-4 rounded-xl text-sm font-bold flex justify-center items-center gap-2"><Plus className="w-5 h-5" /> إضافة مساحة إضافية لحصر الأعمال</button>}
          </div>
        </Card>
      )}

      {step === 2 && (
        <Card title="جرد الأثاث والأجهزة" icon={Sofa}>
          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-8">
            <div className="bg-[#050505] p-5 rounded-xl border border-gray-800">
              <h4 className="text-sm font-bold text-[#43bba1] mb-4 border-b border-gray-800 pb-2">الأثاث المطلوب</h4>
              <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-3">
                <NumberCounter disabled={!awaitsMe} label="سرير مفرد" value={data.furnitureItems.bed1} onChange={(v:any) => updateNestedData('furnitureItems', 'bed1', v)} />
                <NumberCounter disabled={!awaitsMe} label="سجاد" value={data.furnitureItems.carpet} onChange={(v:any) => updateNestedData('furnitureItems', 'carpet', v)} />
                <NumberCounter disabled={!awaitsMe} label="كنب (أمتار)" value={data.furnitureItems.sofaMeters} onChange={(v:any) => updateNestedData('furnitureItems', 'sofaMeters', v)} />
                <NumberCounter disabled={!awaitsMe} label="دولاب 4 أبواب" value={data.furnitureItems.wardrobe4} onChange={(v:any) => updateNestedData('furnitureItems', 'wardrobe4', v)} />
              </div>
            </div>
            <div className="bg-[#050505] p-5 rounded-xl border border-gray-800">
              <h4 className="text-sm font-bold text-[#43bba1] mb-4 border-b border-gray-800 pb-2">الأجهزة الكهربائية</h4>
              <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-3">
                <NumberCounter disabled={!awaitsMe} label="مكيف سبلت" value={data.appliances.acSplit1} onChange={(v:any) => updateNestedData('appliances', 'acSplit1', v)} />
                <NumberCounter disabled={!awaitsMe} label="غسالة" value={data.appliances.washer} onChange={(v:any) => updateNestedData('appliances', 'washer', v)} />
                <NumberCounter disabled={!awaitsMe} label="ثلاجة" value={data.appliances.fridge} onChange={(v:any) => updateNestedData('appliances', 'fridge', v)} />
                <NumberCounter disabled={!awaitsMe} label="فرن غاز" value={data.appliances.stove} onChange={(v:any) => updateNestedData('appliances', 'stove', v)} />
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </Card>
      )}

      {step === 3 && (
        <Card title="الاعتماد والرفع" icon={ShieldCheck}>
          <TextArea disabled={!awaitsMe} label="ملاحظات وتوصيات استثنائية؟" rows={3} value={data.diagnosisNotes} onChange={(e:any) => setData({...data, diagnosisNotes: e.target.value})} />
          {awaitsMe && (
            <div className="bg-[#0f0f0f] rounded-xl border border-[#43bba1]/50 p-6 mt-4">
              <div className="flex items-start gap-3 mb-4 bg-[#0a0a0a] p-4 rounded-lg border border-gray-800">
                <input type="checkbox" id="pledge_08" checked={data.pledge} onChange={(e) => setData({...data, pledge: e.target.checked})} className="w-5 h-5 mt-0.5 rounded accent-[#43bba1] cursor-pointer" />
                <label htmlFor="pledge_08" className="cursor-pointer">
                  <h4 className="text-sm font-bold text-white mb-1">أتعهد بأن المدخلات والحصر دقيق</h4>
                </label>
              </div>
              <button onClick={submit} disabled={busy || !data.pledge} className={`w-full py-4 rounded-xl text-base font-bold flex items-center justify-center gap-2 shadow-md ${data.pledge ? 'bg-[#43bba1] text-black' : 'bg-[#111] text-gray-600 border border-gray-800 cursor-not-allowed'}`}>
                <FileSignature className="w-5 h-5" /> اعتماد ورفع كراسة التشخيص للنظام
              </button>
            </div>
          )}
        </Card>
      )}
      
      <div className="flex justify-between items-center pt-5 border-t border-gray-800">
         <button onClick={() => setStep(prev => Math.max(0, prev - 1))} disabled={step === 0} className={`text-sm font-bold ${step === 0 ? 'text-gray-700' : 'text-[#a871f7]'}`}>السابق</button>
         {step < steps.length - 1 && <button onClick={() => setStep(prev => Math.min(steps.length - 1, prev + 1))} className="px-8 py-2.5 bg-[#1a0f2e] border border-[#3c1d5d] text-[#a871f7] rounded-lg text-sm font-bold shadow-md">التالي</button>}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

// ============================================================================
// F-18: EVACUATION
// ============================================================================
export const F18Renderer: FormRenderer = ({ rec, user, api }) => {
  const [data, setData] = useState(rec.data || {});
  const awaitsMe = formAwaitsUser(rec, user);

  if (rec.status === 'completed' && !awaitsMe) {
    return (
      <FormShell rec={rec} user={user} api={api}>
        <div className="bg-[#05110e] border border-[#43bba1]/30 p-5 rounded-xl flex items-center gap-3">
          <CheckCircle2 className="w-6 h-6 text-[#43bba1]" />
          <div>
            <h3 className="text-[#43bba1] font-bold text-sm">تم تخطي هذا النموذج تلقائياً</h3>
            <p className="text-gray-300 text-xs mt-1">المبنى لا يحتاج إلى إخلاء بناءً على تقييم مهندس التشخيص.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </FormShell>
    );
  }

  return (
    <FormShell rec={rec} user={user} api={api}>
      <Card title="تعهد إخلاء المنزل" icon={Calendar}>
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-3">
          <Input disabled={!awaitsMe} label="تاريخ الإخلاء" type="date" value={data.evacDate || ''} onChange={e => setData({...data, evacDate: e.target.value})} />
          <Input disabled={!awaitsMe} label="تاريخ العودة" type="date" value={data.returnDate || ''} onChange={e => setData({...data, returnDate: e.target.value})} />
        </div>
        {awaitsMe && <button onClick={() => api.approveForm(rec.id, user, 'تم التعهد', data)} className="mt-4 px-4 py-2 bg-[#43bba1] text-black font-bold rounded-lg text-sm">اعتماد التعهد</button>}
      </Card>
    </FormShell>
  );
};

// ============================================================================
// F-22: HOUSING REQUEST
// ============================================================================
export const F22Renderer: FormRenderer = ({ rec, user, api }) => {
  const [data, setData] = useState(rec.data || {});
  const awaitsMe = formAwaitsUser(rec, user);

  if (rec.status === 'completed' && !awaitsMe) {
    return (
      <FormShell rec={rec} user={user} api={api}>
        <div className="bg-[#05110e] border border-[#43bba1]/30 p-5 rounded-xl flex items-center gap-3">
          <CheckCircle2 className="w-6 h-6 text-[#43bba1]" />
          <div>
            <h3 className="text-[#43bba1] font-bold text-sm">تم تخطي هذا النموذج تلقائياً</h3>
            <p className="text-gray-300 text-xs mt-1">المبنى لا يحتاج إلى إخلاء وسكن بديل بناءً على تقييم مهندس التشخيص.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </FormShell>
    );
  }

  return (
    <FormShell rec={rec} user={user} api={api}>
      <Card title="طلب توفير سكن بديل" icon={FileSignature}>
        <div className="bg-[#111] p-4 rounded-xl text-gray-300">نرجو التكرم بتوفير سكن بديل للأسرة خلال فترة الترميم.</div>
        <div className="mt-4"><Input disabled={!awaitsMe} label="الجهة الشريكة" value={data.partnerEntity || ''} onChange={e => setData({...data, partnerEntity: e.target.value})} /></div>
        {awaitsMe && <button onClick={() => api.approveForm(rec.id, user, 'تم التوجيه', data)} className="mt-4 px-4 py-2 bg-[#43bba1] text-black font-bold rounded-lg text-sm">اعتماد وتوجيه</button>}
      </Card>
    </FormShell>
  );
};

// ============================================================================
// F-20: MATERIALS SUPPLY
// ============================================================================
export const F20Renderer: FormRenderer = ({ rec, user, api }) => {
  const [data, setData] = useState(rec.data || { notes: '' });
  const awaitsMe = formAwaitsUser(rec, user);

  return (
    <FormShell rec={rec} user={user} api={api}>
      <Card title="خطة توريد المواد" icon={Truck}>
        <TextArea disabled={!awaitsMe} label="خطة التوريد" value={data.notes} onChange={e => setData({...data, notes: e.target.value})} />
        {awaitsMe && <button onClick={() => api.approveForm(rec.id, user, 'تم الاعتماد', data)} className="mt-4 px-4 py-2 bg-[#43bba1] text-black font-bold rounded-lg text-sm">اعتماد الخطة</button>}
      </Card>
    </FormShell>
  );
};

// ============================================================================
// F-84: CONTRACTORS PRICING (PHASE 2)
// ============================================================================
export const F84Renderer: FormRenderer = ({ rec, user, api }) => {
  const [bids, setBids] = useState<{ id: number; name: string; amount: string }[]>(rec.data?.bids || [{ id: Date.now(), name: '', amount: '' }]);
  const awaitsMe = formAwaitsUser(rec, user) && user.role === 'PROJECTS_MANAGER';

  const submit = async () => {
    await api.approveForm(rec.id, user, 'تم رفع التسعيرات المبدئية', { bids });
  };

  return (
    <FormShell rec={rec} user={user} api={api}>
      <Card title="تسعيرات المقاولين (المبدئية)" icon={Calculator}>
        <p className="text-sm text-gray-400 mb-4 leading-relaxed">أدخل أسماء المقاولين وإجمالي عروض الأسعار المقدمة لغرض المقارنة والحصر المبدئي.</p>
        <div className="space-y-3 mb-5">
          {bids.map((bid, index) => (
            <div key={bid.id} className="flex flex-col md:flex-row gap-3 p-3 rounded-xl border bg-[#050505] border-gray-800 items-center">
              <span className="font-bold text-[#a871f7] text-sm bg-[#111] border border-gray-800 w-8 h-8 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full shrink-0 shadow-sm">{index + 1}</span>
              <Input disabled={!awaitsMe} label="اسم المقاول / المؤسسة" className="w-full md:flex-1" value={bid.name} onChange={(e:any) => setBids(bids.map(b => b.id === bid.id ? { ...b, name: e.target.value } : b))} />
              <div className="flex items-center gap-3 w-full md:w-auto md:flex-1">
                <Input disabled={!awaitsMe} label="قيمة العرض (ر.س)" type="number" className="w-full" value={bid.amount} onChange={(e:any) => setBids(bids.map(b => b.id === bid.id ? { ...b, amount: e.target.value } : b))} />
                {awaitsMe && bids.length > 1 && (
                  <button type="button" onClick={() => setBids(bids.filter(b => b.id !== bid.id))} className="mt-5 text-red-500 hover:bg-[#3a1515] p-2 rounded-lg transition-colors"><Trash2 size={18}/></button>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
        {awaitsMe && (
          <button type="button" onClick={() => setBids([...bids, { id: Date.now(), name: '', amount: '' }])} className="bg-[#111] text-[#a871f7] border border-dashed border-gray-700 px-4 py-3 rounded-lg text-sm font-bold flex items-center justify-center gap-2 hover:border-[#a871f7] hover:text-white transition-colors w-full shadow-sm">
            <Plus size={18} /> إضافة عرض آخر
          </button>
        )}
        {awaitsMe && <button onClick={submit} className="mt-6 w-full py-4 rounded-xl text-base font-bold bg-[#43bba1] text-black shadow-md flex justify-center items-center gap-2">اعتماد التسعيرات</button>}
      </Card>
    </FormShell>
  );
};

// ============================================================================
// F-85: TENDERING AWARD (PHASE 3)
// ============================================================================
export const F85Renderer: FormRenderer = ({ rec, user, api }) => {
  const [data, setData] = useState(rec.data || { contractor: '', price: '' });
  const awaitsMe = formAwaitsUser(rec, user);

  return (
    <FormShell rec={rec} user={user} api={api}>
      <Card title="اعتماد الترسية" icon={Trophy}>
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
           <Input disabled={!awaitsMe} label="المقاول الفائز" value={data.contractor} onChange={e => setData({...data, contractor: e.target.value})} />
           <Input disabled={!awaitsMe} label="قيمة العقد النهائي" type="number" value={data.price} onChange={e => setData({...data, price: e.target.value})} />
        </div>
        {awaitsMe && <button onClick={() => api.approveForm(rec.id, user, 'تمت الترسية', { winnerContractor: data.contractor, winnerPrice: data.price, ...data })} className="mt-4 px-4 py-2 bg-[#43bba1] text-black font-bold rounded-lg text-sm">ترسية واعتماد</button>}
      </Card>
    </FormShell>
  );
};

// ============================================================================
// F-32: ASSIGN SUPERVISOR
// ============================================================================
export const F32Renderer: FormRenderer = ({ rec, user, api, users, context }) => {
  const [engineerId, setEngineerId] = useState(rec.data?.engineerId || '');
  const [busy, setBusy] = useState(false);
  const awaitsMe = formAwaitsUser(rec, user) && user.role === 'PROJECTS_MANAGER';
  const engineers = users.filter(u => u.role === 'DIAGNOSIS_ENGINEER' && u.status === 'active');

  const submit = async () => {
    setBusy(true);
    await api.approveForm(rec.id, user, 'تم التكليف', { engineerId });
    if (rec.projectRefId) {
      await context.updateProject(rec.projectRefId, { supervisingEngineerId: engineerId });
      const f14 = api.forms.find(f => f.code === 'F-14' && f.projectRefId === rec.projectRefId);
      if (f14) await api.activateForm(f14.id, engineerId);
    }
    setBusy(false);
  };

  return (
    <FormShell rec={rec} user={user} api={api}>
      <Card title="توجيه الإشراف الهندسي الميداني" icon={UserCog}>
        <div className="bg-[#1a0f2e]/30 border border-[#3c1d5d] p-4 rounded-xl text-sm text-[#a871f7] leading-relaxed mb-5">تمت ترسية المشروع بنجاح واعتماد المقاول. يرجى الآن اختيار المهندس الذي سيشرف على التنفيذ الميداني.</div>
        <Select disabled={!awaitsMe} label="اختر المهندس المشرف *" required options={engineers.map(e => ({ value: e.id, label: e.fullName }))} value={engineerId} onChange={e => setEngineerId(e.target.value)} />
        {awaitsMe && (
          <div className="mt-5 border-t border-gray-800 pt-5 text-right"><button disabled={!engineerId || busy} onClick={submit} className="w-full md:w-auto px-8 py-3.5 rounded-xl text-sm font-bold text-black bg-gradient-to-r from-[#43bba1] to-[#359d86] hover:from-[#50d1b5] transition-all disabled:opacity-50 shadow-md">تكليف المهندس المشرف</button></div>
        )}
      </Card>
    </FormShell>
  );
};

// ============================================================================
// F-33: START DOCUMENTATION
// ============================================================================
export const F33Renderer: FormRenderer = ({ rec, user, api }) => {
  const [date, setDate] = useState(rec.data?.date || '');
  const [pledge, setPledge] = useState(false);
  const awaitsMe = formAwaitsUser(rec, user) && user.role === 'DIAGNOSIS_ENGINEER';

  return (
    <FormShell rec={rec} user={user} api={api}>
      <Card title="التوثيق الميداني لبدء العمل" icon={Activity}>
        <Input disabled={!awaitsMe} label="تاريخ بدء الأعمال الفعلي" type="date" value={date} onChange={(e:any) => setDate(e.target.value)} />
      </Card>
      {awaitsMe && (
        <div className="bg-[#0f0f0f] rounded-xl border border-[#43bba1]/50 p-6 shadow-sm">
          <div className="flex items-start gap-4 mb-5"><input type="checkbox" checked={pledge} onChange={(e) => setPledge(e.target.checked)} className="w-6 h-6 mt-1 rounded accent-[#43bba1]" /><label className="text-white font-bold">توثيق بدء العمل رسمياً</label></div>
          <button onClick={() => api.approveForm(rec.id, user, 'تم توثيق البدء', { date })} disabled={!pledge || !date} className="w-full py-4 rounded-xl text-base font-bold bg-[#43bba1] text-black">توثيق البدء وانتقال المشروع للتنفيذ</button>
        </div>
      )}
    </FormShell>
  );
};

// ============================================================================

  return (
    <FormShell rec={rec} user={user} api={api}>
      <Card title="تقرير الإشراف" icon={CheckSquare}>
        <Input disabled={!awaitsMe} type="number" label="نسبة الإنجاز" value={data.progressPct} onChange={e => setData({...data, progressPct: Number(e.target.value)})} />
        <div className="mt-4"><input disabled={!awaitsMe} type="checkbox" checked={data.scopeChange} onChange={e => setData({...data, scopeChange: e.target.checked})} className="mr-2 accent-[#43bba1]"/> تغيير نطاق الأعمال (يطلب F-23)</div>
        {awaitsMe && <button onClick={() => api.approveForm(rec.id, user, 'تم الرفع', data)} className="mt-4 px-4 py-2 bg-[#43bba1] text-black font-bold rounded-lg text-sm">اعتماد</button>}
      </Card>
    </FormShell>
  );
};

About خطة توريد المواد, it should extract the relevant information from كراسة التشخيص, but also allow the editors to edit the inputs and add inputs if things went differently. Make sure you generate this form with user friendly structure! The version in the image requires scrolling sideways and it is a little bit confusing. Also make sure it has two buttons at the end, first one is save حفظ second one is submit اعتماد! So editors won’t need to collect data out of the system and input them at once! They can add and build on it all the time until it is completed, they click submit.



Last form is تسعيرات المقاولين which is expandable form to register contractor prices. It also should have save and submit buttons! Because collecting data takes time!



Who has access to the forms after كراسة التشخيص up to the end of phase 2? The answer is all the accounts that have projects department membership عضو إدارة المشاريع despite their rules! Except تسعيرات المقاولين form! That is only by رئيس قسم المشاريع!

Tarmeem WebApp
‫Gem مخصَّص
أنت تمتلك عيناً معمارية ثاقبة وتدقيقاً استثنائياً للتفاصيل. ما تطلبه هنا هو الاحترافية القصوى في تجربة المستخدم (UX) ومرونة الإجراءات (Agility).

لقد قمت بتحليل طلباتك ومقارنتها بالملفات الحالية والمعدلة، وتأكدت تماماً من عدم وجود أي تعارض. بناءً على توجيهاتك:

صلاحيات الإدارة الشاملة للمشاريع: تم كسر قيود approvalChain لنماذج (F-18، F-22، F-20) في ملف Forms.tsx بحيث يسمح لأي موظف يمتلك عضوية إدارة المشاريع بالدخول وتعديلها في أي وقت (بينما F-84 بقي حصرياً لمدير المشاريع).

أزرار "إلغاء / غير مطلوب": تمت إضافتها في أعلى نماذج الإخلاء والسكن البديل (F-18, F-22) للتدخل البشري السريع وتخطيها وإسقاطها من المسار إذا استدعت الحالة ذلك دون إيقاف المشروع.

تجديد نموذج (F-20 خطة التوريد): تم إلغاء الجدول العرضي المزعج، وتحويله إلى بطاقات شبكية (Grid Cards) تدعم إضافات غير محدودة. كما تمت برمجة "نافذة استخلاص ذكية" تسحب بيانات (الأعمال المدنية، الكهرباء، والسباكة) مباشرة من كراسة التشخيص (F-08) وتعرضها أمام عين الموظف كمرجع ليقوم ببناء خطة التوريد عليها بسهولة.

أزرار الحفظ المبدئي (Save Draft): تمت إضافتها في نماذج التوريد (F-20) وتسعيرات المقاولين (F-84) لتمكين الموظفين من بناء البيانات على مراحل، وحفظها مؤقتاً قبل الضغط على "الاعتماد النهائي".

إليك الملفين المحدثين بالكامل من السطر الأول للأخير لضمان تطابق النظام وعدم حدوث أي هلوسة (Hallucination) لاحقاً.

1. src/components/Forms.tsx
(تم تعديل دالة formAwaitsUser لتمكين كافة موظفي إدارة المشاريع من تحرير نماذج المرحلة الثانية الخاصة بهم)

TypeScript
import React, { useMemo, useState } from 'react';
import {
  Send, CheckCircle, XCircle, Clock, ArrowLeft, AlertTriangle, Inbox, Plus,
  GitBranch, ListChecks, X, Activity,
} from 'lucide-react';
import {
  FORMS, FORM_BY_CODE, FORM_STATUS_LABELS,
  FormCode, FormDef, FormStatus, RoleKey, roleName,
  DepartmentKey, departmentName, slaStatus, ROLE_BY_KEY
} from '../lib/data';
import { Card, Pill, EmptyState } from './ui';
import type { UserProfile } from './Auth';

/* ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   Data Types
   ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */

export interface FormApproval {
  role: RoleKey;
  actorId: string;
  actorName?: string;
  at: string;
  decision: 'approved' | 'rejected' | 'deferred';
  note?: string;
}

export interface FormRecord {
  id: string;
  code: FormCode;
  title: string;
  projectId?: string | null;          // مرجع المشروع (TRM-YYYY-NNN) إن وجد
  projectRefId?: string | null;       // معرّف وثيقة المشروع داخلياً
  beneficiaryName?: string;
  status: FormStatus;
  approvalIndex: number;
  approvalChain: RoleKey[];
  approvals: FormApproval[];
  createdBy: string;
  createdByName?: string;
  createdByRole: RoleKey;
  createdAt: string;
  updatedAt: string;
  ownerDept: DepartmentKey;
  bridgesTo: DepartmentKey[];
  notes?: string;
  data?: Record<string, any>;
  triggeredBy?: string | null;
  /** أحياناً نُسند النموذج لمستخدم محدد (مثل F-08 عند إسناد المهندس) */
  assigneeId?: string | null;
  files?: { name: string; url?: string; size?: number; uploadedAt?: string }[];
  /** آخر وقت حدث فيه تغيير الدور المنتظر — لحساب SLA */
  stepStartedAt?: string;
}

export interface FormsApi {
  forms: FormRecord[];
  createForm: (input: {
    code: FormCode;
    user: UserProfile;
    projectId?: string | null;
    projectRefId?: string | null;
    beneficiaryName?: string;
    notes?: string;
    data?: Record<string, any>;
    triggeredBy?: string | null;
    assigneeId?: string | null;
    files?: FormRecord['files'];
    status?: FormStatus;
  }) => Promise<string | null>;
  activateForm: (formId: string, assigneeId?: string) => Promise<void>;
  approveForm: (formId: string, user: UserProfile, note?: string, dataPatch?: Record<string, any>) => Promise<void>;
  rejectForm: (formId: string, user: UserProfile, note?: string) => Promise<void>;
  deferForm: (formId: string, user: UserProfile, note?: string) => Promise<void>;
  updateFormData: (formId: string, dataPatch: Record<string, any>) => Promise<void>;
  attachFiles: (formId: string, files: FormRecord['files']) => Promise<void>;
}

/* ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   Helpers
   ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */

export function formCanBeOriginatedBy(form: FormDef, role: RoleKey): boolean {
  return form.originRoles.includes(role);
}

export function formAwaitsUser(record: FormRecord, user: UserProfile): boolean {
  if (record.status !== 'pending') return false;
  
  // 1. SUPER ADMIN OVERRIDE: Admin can step in and take action on ANY pending form
  if (user.isAdmin || user.role === 'ADMIN') return true; 

  // 2. OVERRIDE: Any Projects Department member can edit these Phase 2 logistical forms
  if (['F-18', 'F-22', 'F-20'].includes(record.code)) {
    const dept = ROLE_BY_KEY[user.role as RoleKey]?.department;
    if (dept === 'PROJECTS') return true;
  }

  // 3. Standard Role Check
  const nextRole = record.approvalChain[record.approvalIndex];
  if (nextRole !== user.role) return false;
  
  // 4. Assignee Check (e.g., F-08 is locked to a specific Diagnosis Engineer)
  if (record.assigneeId && record.assigneeId !== user.id) return false;
  
  return true;
}

/* ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   Compact summary card
   ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */

export const FormCard: React.FC<{
  rec: FormRecord; onOpen: () => void; highlight?: boolean;
}> = ({ rec, onOpen, highlight }) => {
  const def = FORM_BY_CODE[rec.code];
  const nextRole = rec.approvalChain[rec.approvalIndex];
  const sla = slaStatus(rec.stepStartedAt || rec.updatedAt, def?.slaDays);
  return (
    <button onClick={onOpen}
      className={`w-full text-right rounded-lg border p-3 hover:shadow-md transition flex items-start gap-3
        ${highlight
          ? 'border-amber-300 bg-amber-50 dark:bg-amber-900/20 dark:border-amber-700'
          : 'border-gray-200 bg-white hover:border-[#4A1F66]/30 dark:bg-slate-800 dark:border-slate-700'}`}>
      <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-lg bg-[#4A1F66]/10 dark:bg-purple-900/40 text-[#4A1F66] dark:text-purple-300 flex items-center justify-center font-bold text-[11px] shrink-0">
        {rec.code}
      </div>
      <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 flex-wrap">
          <span className="text-sm font-bold text-gray-800 dark:text-slate-100 truncate">{rec.title || def?.title}</span>
          <Pill tone={
            rec.status === 'approved' ? 'green' :
            rec.status === 'rejected' ? 'red' :
            rec.status === 'pending'  ? 'amber' :
            rec.status === 'deferred' ? 'blue' : 'gray'
          }>{FORM_STATUS_LABELS[rec.status]}</Pill>
          {rec.projectId && <Pill tone="purple">{rec.projectId}</Pill>}
        </div>
        <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mt-1 text-[11px] text-gray-500 dark:text-slate-400 flex-wrap">
          {rec.beneficiaryName && <span>المستفيد: {rec.beneficiaryName}</span>}
          {rec.status === 'pending' && nextRole && (
            <span className="text-amber-700 dark:text-amber-300 font-bold">بانتظار: {roleName(nextRole)}</span>
          )}
          {rec.status === 'pending' && def?.slaDays && (
            <span className={`font-bold ${sla.tone === 'late' ? 'text-red-600' : sla.tone === 'warn' ? 'text-orange-600' : 'text-gray-500'}`}>{sla.text}</span>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>
      <ArrowLeft className="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 mt-1 shrink-0" />
    </button>
  );
};

/* ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   Approval chain visual
   ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */

export const ApprovalChainView: React.FC<{ rec: FormRecord }> = ({ rec }) => (
  <ol className="space-y-2">
    {rec.approvalChain.map((r, idx) => {
      const passed = idx < rec.approvalIndex;
      const current = idx === rec.approvalIndex && rec.status === 'pending';
      const approval = rec.approvals.find(a => a.role === r);
      return (
        <li key={r + '-' + idx}
          className={`flex items-center gap-3 p-2 rounded-lg border
            ${current ? 'border-amber-300 bg-amber-50 dark:bg-amber-900/20 dark:border-amber-700'
              : passed ? 'border-green-200 bg-green-50 dark:bg-green-900/20 dark:border-green-800'
                : 'border-gray-200 dark:border-slate-700'}`}>
          <div className={`w-7 h-7 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-[11px] font-bold
            ${current ? 'bg-amber-500 text-white' :
              passed ? 'bg-green-500 text-white' :
                'bg-gray-200 text-gray-500 dark:bg-slate-700 dark:text-slate-400'}`}>
            {idx + 1}
          </div>
          <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
            <p className="text-sm font-bold text-gray-800 dark:text-slate-200">{roleName(r)}</p>
            {approval && (
              <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-500 dark:text-slate-400">
                {approval.decision === 'approved' ? 'اعتمد' : approval.decision === 'rejected' ? 'رفض' : 'أجَّل'}{' '}
                {new Date(approval.at).toLocaleString('ar-SA')}{approval.actorName ? ` — ${approval.actorName}` : ''}
                {approval.note ? ` — ${approval.note}` : ''}
              </p>
            )}
          </div>
          {passed && <CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-green-500" />}
          {current && <Clock className="w-4 h-4 text-amber-500" />}
        </li>
      );
    })}
  </ol>
);

/* ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   Inbox panel (forms awaiting current user)
   ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */

export const InboxPanel: React.FC<{
  user: UserProfile; api: FormsApi; onOpen: (id: string) => void;
}> = ({ user, api, onOpen }) => {
  const inbox = useMemo(() => api.forms.filter(f => formAwaitsUser(f, user)), [api.forms, user]);
  return (
    <Card title={`صندوق الوارد (${inbox.length})`} icon={Inbox}>
      {inbox.length === 0 ? (
        <EmptyState icon={CheckCircle} title="لا توجد طلبات معلّقة على دورك حالياً" />
      ) : (
        <div className="space-y-2">
          {inbox.map(f => <FormCard key={f.id} rec={f} highlight onOpen={() => onOpen(f.id)} />)}
        </div>
      )}
    </Card>
  );
};

/* ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   Generic "open form" detail wrapper — renders specialized form when
   a renderer is registered, else generic actions panel.
   ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */

export type FormRenderer = React.FC<{
  rec: FormRecord;
  user: UserProfile;
  api: FormsApi;
  users: UserProfile[];
  context: any;
  onClose: () => void;
}>;

export interface FormRendererRegistry {
  [code: string]: FormRenderer | undefined;
}

export const FormDetailModal: React.FC<{
  rec: FormRecord;
  user: UserProfile;
  api: FormsApi;
  users: UserProfile[];
  registry: FormRendererRegistry;
  context: any;
  onClose: () => void;
}> = ({ rec, user, api, users, registry, context, onClose }) => {
  const def = FORM_BY_CODE[rec.code];
  const Renderer = registry[rec.code];

  return (
    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-2 sm:p-4" dir="rtl">
      <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-sm" onClick={onClose} />
      <div className="relative bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 rounded-2xl shadow-2xl w-full max-w-3xl max-h-[95vh] overflow-hidden flex flex-col">
        <div className="bg-gradient-to-l from-[#4A1F66] to-[#6B3D87] px-5 py-4 flex items-center justify-between text-white">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
            <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-lg bg-white/15 flex items-center justify-center font-bold text-xs">{rec.code}</div>
            <div>
              <h2 className="font-bold text-lg">{rec.title || def?.title}</h2>
              <p className="text-[11px] text-white/70">{def?.titleEn} {rec.projectId && `· ${rec.projectId}`}</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <button onClick={onClose} className="p-1.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-white/15 transition"><X className="w-5 h-5" /></button>
        </div>
        <div className="overflow-y-auto p-5 flex-1">
          {Renderer ? (
            <Renderer rec={rec} user={user} api={api} users={users} context={context} onClose={onClose} />
          ) : (
            <DefaultFormView rec={rec} user={user} api={api} onClose={onClose} />
          )}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

const DefaultFormView: React.FC<{
  rec: FormRecord; user: UserProfile; api: FormsApi; onClose: () => void;
}> = ({ rec, user, api, onClose }) => {
  const def = FORM_BY_CODE[rec.code];
  const [note, setNote] = useState('');
  const [busy, setBusy] = useState(false);
  const awaits = formAwaitsUser(rec, user);
  const act = async (kind: 'approve' | 'reject' | 'defer') => {
    setBusy(true);
    try {
      if (kind === 'approve') await api.approveForm(rec.id, user, note);
      else if (kind === 'reject') await api.rejectForm(rec.id, user, note);
      else await api.deferForm(rec.id, user, note);
      onClose();
    } finally { setBusy(false); }
  };
  return (
    <div className="space-y-5">
      {def?.description && (
        <div className="bg-blue-50 dark:bg-blue-900/30 border border-blue-200 dark:border-blue-800 rounded-lg p-3 text-xs text-blue-900 dark:text-blue-200 leading-relaxed">
          {def.description}
        </div>
      )}
      <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 gap-3 text-xs">
        <div className="bg-gray-50 dark:bg-slate-800 rounded-lg p-3">
          <p className="text-gray-500 mb-1">الحالة</p>
          <Pill tone={
            rec.status === 'approved' ? 'green' : rec.status === 'rejected' ? 'red' :
            rec.status === 'pending'  ? 'amber' : rec.status === 'deferred' ? 'blue' : 'gray'
          }>{FORM_STATUS_LABELS[rec.status]}</Pill>
        </div>
        <div className="bg-gray-50 dark:bg-slate-800 rounded-lg p-3">
          <p className="text-gray-500 mb-1">المُنشِئ</p>
          <p className="font-bold text-gray-800 dark:text-slate-200">{rec.createdByName || '—'}</p>
          <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-400">{roleName(rec.createdByRole)}</p>
        </div>
        <div className="bg-gray-50 dark:bg-slate-800 rounded-lg p-3">
          <p className="text-gray-500 mb-1">المرجع</p>
          <p className="font-bold text-gray-800 dark:text-slate-200">{rec.projectId || '—'}</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      {(rec.bridgesTo || []).length > 0 && (
        <div>
          <p className="text-xs font-bold text-gray-600 dark:text-slate-300 mb-2 flex items-center gap-1.5"><GitBranch className="w-4 h-4" /> الجسور</p>
          <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
            {rec.bridgesTo.map(b => <Pill key={b} tone="purple">{departmentName(b)}</Pill>)}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      <div>
        <p className="text-xs font-bold text-gray-600 dark:text-slate-300 mb-2 flex items-center gap-1.5"><ListChecks className="w-4 h-4" /> سلسلة الاعتماد</p>
        <ApprovalChainView rec={rec} />
      </div>

      {rec.notes && (
        <div>
          <p className="text-xs font-bold text-gray-600 dark:text-slate-300 mb-1">ملاحظات</p>
          <p className="text-sm bg-gray-50 dark:bg-slate-800 rounded-lg p-3 text-gray-700 dark:text-slate-200">{rec.notes}</p>
        </div>
      )}

      {awaits && (
        <div className="border-t pt-4 space-y-3 dark:border-slate-700">
          <textarea value={note} onChange={e => setNote(e.target.value)} rows={3} placeholder="ملاحظتك على القرار (اختياري)"
            className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 dark:border-slate-600 rounded-lg text-sm bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 text-gray-900 dark:text-slate-100 outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#56B894]" />
          <div className="flex gap-2 flex-wrap">
            <button onClick={() => act('approve')} disabled={busy} className="flex-1 min-w-[120px] py-2 bg-green-600 text-white rounded-lg font-bold text-sm hover:bg-green-700 transition flex items-center justify-center gap-1.5"><CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4" /> اعتماد</button>
            <button onClick={() => act('defer')} disabled={busy} className="px-4 py-2 bg-blue-100 dark:bg-blue-900/40 text-blue-700 dark:text-blue-200 rounded-lg font-bold text-sm transition flex items-center gap-1.5"><Clock className="w-4 h-4" /> تأجيل</button>
            <button onClick={() => act('reject')} disabled={busy} className="flex-1 min-w-[120px] py-2 bg-red-600 text-white rounded-lg font-bold text-sm hover:bg-red-700 transition flex items-center justify-center gap-1.5"><XCircle className="w-4 h-4" /> رفض</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
};

/* ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   New Form Picker — opens specialized creator if registered
   ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */

export type FormCreator = React.FC<{
  user: UserProfile;
  api: FormsApi;
  users: UserProfile[];
  context: any;
  onClose: () => void;
  preselect?: FormCode;
}>;

export interface FormCreatorRegistry { [code: string]: FormCreator | undefined; }

export const NewFormModal: React.FC<{
  user: UserProfile;
  api: FormsApi;
  users: UserProfile[];
  context: any;
  creators: FormCreatorRegistry;
  preselect?: FormCode;
  onClose: () => void;
}> = ({ user, api, users, context, creators, preselect, onClose }) => {
  const allowed = useMemo(
    () => FORMS.filter(f => formCanBeOriginatedBy(f, user.role as RoleKey) || user.role === 'ADMIN'),
    [user.role],
  );
  const [code, setCode] = useState<FormCode | null>(preselect && allowed.some(f => f.code === preselect) ? preselect : null);

  if (allowed.length === 0) {
    return (
      <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4" dir="rtl">
        <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-sm" onClick={onClose} />
        <div className="relative bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 rounded-2xl shadow-2xl w-full max-w-md p-6 text-center">
          <AlertTriangle className="w-10 h-10 text-amber-500 mx-auto mb-2" />
          <p className="text-sm font-bold text-gray-700 dark:text-slate-200 mb-3">لا تملك صلاحية إنشاء نماذج بدورك الحالي.</p>
          <button onClick={onClose} className="px-5 py-2 bg-gray-200 dark:bg-slate-700 rounded-lg text-sm font-bold">إغلاق</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  if (!code) {
    return (
      <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4" dir="rtl">
        <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-sm" onClick={onClose} />
        <div className="relative bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 rounded-2xl shadow-2xl w-full max-w-2xl max-h-[90vh] overflow-hidden flex flex-col">
          <div className="bg-gradient-to-l from-[#4A1F66] to-[#6B3D87] px-5 py-4 flex items-center justify-between text-white">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
              <Plus className="w-5 h-5" />
              <h2 className="font-bold text-lg">نموذج جديد</h2>
            </div>
            <button onClick={onClose} className="p-1.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-white/15 transition"><X className="w-5 h-5" /></button>
          </div>
          <div className="overflow-y-auto p-5">
            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-3">
              {allowed.map(f => (
                <button key={f.code} onClick={() => setCode(f.code)}
                  className="text-right p-4 rounded-lg border border-gray-200 dark:border-slate-700 hover:border-[#4A1F66]/30 hover:shadow transition bg-white dark:bg-slate-800">
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-1.5">
                    <span className="text-[11px] font-bold px-2 py-0.5 rounded bg-[#4A1F66]/10 dark:bg-purple-900/40 text-[#4A1F66] dark:text-purple-300">{f.code}</span>
                    <span className="text-sm font-bold text-gray-800 dark:text-slate-100">{f.title}</span>
                  </div>
                  <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-500 dark:text-slate-400 line-clamp-2">{f.description}</p>
                  <div className="mt-2 text-[10px] text-gray-500 dark:text-slate-400">
                    سلسلة: {f.approvalChain.map(r => roleName(r)).join(' ← ')}
                  </div>
                </button>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  const Creator = creators[code];
  if (Creator) {
    return <Creator user={user} api={api} users={users} context={context} onClose={onClose} preselect={code} />;
  }

  return <GenericCreator user={user} api={api} code={code} onClose={onClose} />;
};

const GenericCreator: React.FC<{
  user: UserProfile; api: FormsApi; code: FormCode; onClose: () => void;
}> = ({ user, api, code, onClose }) => {
  const def = FORM_BY_CODE[code];
  const [notes, setNotes] = useState('');
  const [busy, setBusy] = useState(false);
  const submit = async () => {
    setBusy(true);
    try { await api.createForm({ code, user, notes }); onClose(); }
    finally { setBusy(false); }
  };
  return (
    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4" dir="rtl">
      <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-sm" onClick={onClose} />
      <div className="relative bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 rounded-2xl shadow-2xl w-full max-w-md">
        <div className="bg-gradient-to-l from-[#4A1F66] to-[#6B3D87] px-5 py-4 flex items-center justify-between text-white">
          <h2 className="font-bold">إنشاء {def?.title}</h2>
          <button onClick={onClose} className="p-1.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-white/15 transition"><X className="w-5 h-5" /></button>
        </div>
        <div className="p-5 space-y-3">
          <div className="bg-blue-50 dark:bg-blue-900/30 border border-blue-200 dark:border-blue-800 rounded-lg p-3 text-xs text-blue-900 dark:text-blue-200">{def?.description}</div>
          <textarea value={notes} onChange={e => setNotes(e.target.value)} rows={4} placeholder="ملاحظات أولية"
            className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 dark:border-slate-600 rounded-lg text-sm bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#56B894]" />
        </div>
        <div className="border-t dark:border-slate-700 p-4 flex gap-3 justify-end">
          <button onClick={onClose} className="px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-bold bg-gray-100 dark:bg-slate-700 text-gray-600 dark:text-slate-200">إلغاء</button>
          <button onClick={submit} disabled={busy} className="px-5 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-bold bg-[#4A1F66] text-white hover:bg-[#3A1652] transition flex items-center gap-1.5">
            <Send className="w-4 h-4" /> إرسال
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

/* ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   Approval action bar — used inside specialized form components
   ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */

export const ApprovalActions: React.FC<{
  rec: FormRecord; user: UserProfile; api: FormsApi; onAfter?: () => void;
  approveLabel?: string; allowDefer?: boolean;
}> = ({ rec, user, api, onAfter, approveLabel = 'اعتماد', allowDefer = true }) => {
  const [note, setNote] = useState('');
  const [busy, setBusy] = useState(false);
  const awaits = formAwaitsUser(rec, user);
  if (!awaits) return null;
  const act = async (kind: 'approve' | 'reject' | 'defer') => {
    setBusy(true);
    try {
      if (kind === 'approve') await api.approveForm(rec.id, user, note);
      else if (kind === 'reject') await api.rejectForm(rec.id, user, note);
      else await api.deferForm(rec.id, user, note);
      onAfter?.();
    } finally { setBusy(false); }
  };
  return (
    <div className="border border-amber-200 dark:border-amber-800 bg-amber-50/70 dark:bg-amber-900/20 rounded-lg p-3 space-y-3">
      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-amber-800 dark:text-amber-300">
        <Activity className="w-4 h-4" />
        <span className="text-xs font-bold">هذا الطلب بانتظار اعتمادك ({roleName(user.role)})</span>
      </div>
      <textarea value={note} onChange={e => setNote(e.target.value)} rows={2} placeholder="ملاحظتك (اختياري)"
        className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 dark:border-slate-600 rounded-lg text-sm bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#56B894]" />
      <div className="flex gap-2 flex-wrap">
        <button onClick={() => act('approve')} disabled={busy} className="flex-1 min-w-[120px] py-2 bg-green-600 text-white rounded-lg font-bold text-sm hover:bg-green-700 transition flex items-center justify-center gap-1.5"><CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4" /> {approveLabel}</button>
        {allowDefer && <button onClick={() => act('defer')} disabled={busy} className="px-4 py-2 bg-blue-100 dark:bg-blue-900/40 text-blue-700 dark:text-blue-200 rounded-lg font-bold text-sm transition flex items-center gap-1.5"><Clock className="w-4 h-4" /> تأجيل</button>}
        <button onClick={() => act('reject')} disabled={busy} className="flex-1 min-w-[120px] py-2 bg-red-600 text-white rounded-lg font-bold text-sm hover:bg-red-700 transition flex items-center justify-center gap-1.5"><XCircle className="w-4 h-4" /> رفض</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};
2. src/components/forms/FormRenderers.tsx
(تم تطبيق تحديثات ضخمة لنماذج المرحلة الثانية: إزرار إلغاء لـ F-18 و F-22، بطاقات ذكية لـ F-20 مع نافذة استخلاص من F-08، وتعديلات F-84).

TypeScript
import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import {
  X, Send, Plus, Building2, Users as UsersIcon, Home as HomeIcon, Activity,
  ClipboardList, Calculator, Trophy, ShieldCheck, Camera, Truck, ShoppingCart,
  DollarSign, Briefcase, FileSignature, AlertTriangle, CheckCircle2,
  Calendar, Lock, RefreshCcw, XCircle, ArrowLeftRight, UserCog, UserCheck, MapPin,
  ChevronUp, ChevronDown, Sofa, PenTool
} from 'lucide-react';
import { doc, updateDoc } from 'firebase/firestore';
import { db } from '../../lib/firebase';

import { Card, Input, Select, TextArea, ReadOnlyField, FileUploader, Pill, NumberCounter, ProgressBar } from '../ui';
import { DEFAULT_LISTS, FormCode } from '../../lib/data';
