const PHASE_LABELS: Record<ProjectRecord['phase'], string> = {
  RESEARCH: 'البحث الاجتماعي', DIAGNOSIS: 'التشخيص الهندسي', EVACUATION: 'إخلاء وسكن بديل',
  TENDERING: 'الترسية والتسعيرات', EXECUTION: 'التنفيذ والإشراف', HANDOVER: 'التسليم', CLOSED: 'مغلق',
};

const PHASE_TITLES = { 1: "الدراسة والاعتماد", 2: "التشخيص والتجهيز", 3: "الترسية والبدء", 4: "التنفيذ والصرف", 5: "الإغلاق" };

const PHASE_TONES: Record<ProjectRecord['phase'], 'gray' | 'amber' | 'blue' | 'purple' | 'green' | 'teal'> = {
  RESEARCH: 'blue', DIAGNOSIS: 'purple', EVACUATION: 'amber', TENDERING: 'amber',
  EXECUTION: 'teal', HANDOVER: 'green', CLOSED: 'gray',
};

const FORM_PHASE_MAP: Record<string, number> = {
  'F-02': 1, 'F-03': 1, 'F-03.1': 1, 'F-03.2': 1, 
  'F-04': 2, 'F-08': 2, 'F-18': 2, 'F-22': 2, 'F-20': 2, 'F-84': 2,
  'F-85': 3, 'F-32': 3, 'F-33': 3, 'F-35': 3, 'F-34': 3,
  'F-19': 4, 'F-14': 4, 'F-23': 4, 'F-15': 4,
  'F-07': 5, 'F-52': 5
};

interface MasterProjectListProps {
  user: UserProfile; api: FormsApi; projects: ProjectRecord[]; users: UserProfile[];
  onOpenProject: (id: string) => void; onCreateForm?: (code?: FormCode) => void;
}

export const MasterProjectList: React.FC<MasterProjectListProps> = ({ projects, onOpenProject, api, user, onCreateForm }) => {
  const [search, setSearch] = useState('');
  const [phaseFilter, setPhaseFilter] = useState<'all' | ProjectRecord['phase']>('all');

  const filtered = useMemo(() => {
    const q = search.trim().toLowerCase();
    return projects.filter(p => {
      if (phaseFilter !== 'all' && p.phase !== phaseFilter) return false;
      if (!q) return true;
      return (p.projectId.toLowerCase().includes(q) || p.beneficiaryName.toLowerCase().includes(q) || (p.city || '').toLowerCase().includes(q));
    });
  }, [projects, search, phaseFilter]);

  return (
    <div dir="rtl" className="space-y-4">
      <Card title="قائمة المشاريع الرئيسية" icon={Building2} accent="gradient">
        <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row gap-3 mb-4">
          <div className="flex-1"><SearchBar value={search} onChange={setSearch} placeholder="بحث برقم المشروع أو اسم المستفيد..." /></div>
          {(user.role === 'SOCIAL_RESEARCHER' || user.isAdmin || user.role === 'ADMIN') && (
            <button onClick={() => onCreateForm?.('F-02')} className="bg-gradient-to-r from-[#43bba1] to-[#359d86] text-black px-5 py-2 rounded-lg font-bold text-sm flex items-center justify-center gap-2 hover:shadow-lg transition">
              <Plus className="w-5 h-5" /> حالة جديدة +
            </button>
          )}
        </div>
        <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2 mb-4">
          {(['all', 'RESEARCH', 'DIAGNOSIS', 'EVACUATION', 'TENDERING', 'EXECUTION', 'HANDOVER', 'CLOSED'] as const).map(p => (
            <button key={p} onClick={() => setPhaseFilter(p)}
              className={`px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full text-xs font-bold transition ${phaseFilter === p ? 'bg-[#4A1F66] text-white shadow' : 'bg-gray-100 dark:bg-slate-700 text-gray-600 dark:text-slate-300 hover:bg-gray-200'}`}>
              {p === 'all' ? 'الكل' : PHASE_LABELS[p]}
            </button>
          ))}
        </div>

        {filtered.length === 0 ? (
          <EmptyState icon={Building2} title="لا توجد مشاريع مطابقة" hint="ينشأ المشروع تلقائياً عند اعتماد F-03 وتحويله إلى المشاريع." />
        ) : (
          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-3">
            {filtered.map(p => {
              const projectForms = api.forms.filter(f => f.projectRefId === p.id);
              const pendingCount = projectForms.filter(f => f.status === 'pending').length;
              return (
                <button key={p.id} onClick={() => onOpenProject(p.id)}
                  className="text-right rounded-xl border border-gray-200 dark:border-slate-700 bg-white dark:bg-slate-800 hover:shadow-lg hover:border-[#4A1F66]/30 transition-all overflow-hidden group">
                  <div className="bg-gradient-to-l from-[#4A1F66] to-[#6B3D87] px-4 py-2.5 flex items-center justify-between text-white">
                    <span className="text-sm font-bold truncate">{p.projectId || '[بدون رقم]'}</span>
                    <Pill tone={PHASE_TONES[p.phase]}>{PHASE_LABELS[p.phase]}</Pill>
                  </div>
                  <div className="p-4 space-y-2">
                    <div>
                      <p className="text-sm font-bold text-gray-800 dark:text-slate-100 truncate">{p.beneficiaryName}</p>
                      <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-500 dark:text-slate-400 flex items-center gap-1 mt-0.5"><MapPin className="w-3 h-3" /> {p.city} {p.neighborhood ? `· ${p.neighborhood}` : ''}</p>
                    </div>
                    <ProgressBar value={p.progressPct} label="التقدم" />
                    <div className="flex items-center justify-between text-[10px]">
                      <span className="text-gray-500 dark:text-slate-400">{projectForms.length} نموذج</span>
                      {pendingCount > 0 && <Pill tone="amber">{pendingCount} معلّق</Pill>}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </button>
              );
            })}
          </div>
        )}
      </Card>
    </div>
  );
};

interface ProjectDetailProps {
  project: ProjectRecord; user: UserProfile; users: UserProfile[]; api: FormsApi;
  onBack: () => void; onOpenForm: (id: string) => void; onDeleteProject?: (id: string) => void;
}

export const ProjectDetail: React.FC<ProjectDetailProps> = ({ project, user, users, api, onBack, onDeleteProject }) => {
  const [activePhase, setActivePhase] = useState<number>(1);
  const [unfoldedForms, setUnfoldedForms] = useState<string[]>([]);
  const [creatorCode, setCreatorCode] = useState<FormCode | null>(null);

  const [draftProjectId, setDraftProjectId] = useState(project.projectId || '');
  const [isSavingId, setIsSavingId] = useState(false);
  const isFrozen = project.data?.isProjectIdFrozen === true;

  const saveProjectId = async (freeze = false) => {
    setIsSavingId(true);
    try {
      const patch: any = { projectId: draftProjectId };
      if (freeze) patch['data'] = { ...(project.data || {}), isProjectIdFrozen: true };
      await updateDoc(doc(db, 'projects', project.id), patch);
    } catch (e) { console.error(e); }
    setIsSavingId(false);
  };

  const getHijriDate = (isoString: string) => {
    try { return new Intl.DateTimeFormat('ar-SA-u-ca-islamic', { day: 'numeric', month: 'long', year: 'numeric' }).format(new Date(isoString)); } 
    catch { return new Date(isoString).toLocaleDateString('ar-SA'); }
  };

  const allProjectForms = useMemo(() => {
    return api.forms.filter(f => f.projectRefId === project.id || f.id === project.data?.f02Id || f.id === project.data?.f03Id).sort((a, b) => new Date(a.createdAt).getTime() - new Date(b.createdAt).getTime());
  }, [api.forms, project]);

  const phaseForms = useMemo(() => {
    const buckets: Record<number, typeof allProjectForms> = { 1: [], 2: [], 3: [], 4: [], 5: [] };
    allProjectForms.forEach(f => { const phase = FORM_PHASE_MAP[f.code] || 1; buckets[phase].push(f); });
    return buckets;
  }, [allProjectForms]);

  const formsContext = useMemo(() => ({
    projects: [project],
    generateProjectId: async () => ({ projectId: project.projectId, serial: 0 }),
    createProject: async () => project.id,
    updateProject: async () => {}, 
    findProjectForm: (refId: string, code: string) => api.forms.find(f => f.projectRefId === refId && f.code === code) || null,
    userById: (id: string) => users.find(u => u.id === id)
  }), [project, users, api.forms]);

  const toggleFormFold = (formId: string) => { setUnfoldedForms(prev => prev.includes(formId) ? prev.filter(id => id !== formId) : [...prev, formId]); };

  useMemo(() => {
    const latestPhase = [5, 4, 3, 2, 1].find(p => phaseForms[p].length > 0) || 1;
    if (activePhase !== latestPhase && unfoldedForms.length === 0) { setActivePhase(latestPhase); if (phaseForms[latestPhase][0]) setUnfoldedForms([phaseForms[latestPhase][0].id]); }
  }, [phaseForms]);

  const checkAccess = (formId: string, role: string, isAdmin: boolean) => {
    if (isAdmin) return true;
    const f = allProjectForms.find(x => x.id === formId);
    if (!f) return false;
    return formAwaitsUser(f, user);
  };

  const creatableForms = useMemo(() => {
    return FORMS.filter(f => FORM_PHASE_MAP[f.code] === activePhase && (f.originRoles.includes(user.role as RoleKey) || user.isAdmin || user.role === 'ADMIN'));
  }, [activePhase, user]);

  return (
    <div dir="rtl" className="min-h-screen bg-[#050505] text-gray-200 font-sans pb-32">
      <main className="p-3 md:p-6 max-w-[1000px] mx-auto">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-6">
          <button onClick={onBack} className="text-xs font-bold text-[#43bba1] hover:text-white transition flex items-center gap-1"><ArrowLeft className="w-4 h-4" /> العودة لقائمة المشاريع</button>
          {user.isAdmin && onDeleteProject && (
            <button onClick={() => { if (window.confirm('حذف هذا المشروع بالكامل؟ لا يمكن التراجع عن هذا الإجراء.')) onDeleteProject(project.id); }} className="bg-red-500 hover:bg-red-600 text-white px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs font-bold shadow-sm transition">حذف المشروع</button>
          )}
        </div>

        <div className="relative rounded-2xl overflow-hidden mb-8 shadow-2xl bg-gradient-to-br from-[#4A1F66] via-[#6B3D87] to-[#43bba1] p-6 text-white border border-[#6B3D87]">
          <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row items-start md:items-center justify-between gap-6">
            <div className="flex-1">
              <h1 className="text-3xl font-black mb-1">{project.beneficiaryName}</h1>
              <p className="text-white/80 text-sm flex items-center gap-1.5 mb-4"><MapPin className="w-4 h-4" /> {project.city} {project.neighborhood ? `· ${project.neighborhood}` : ''}</p>
              <div className="text-xs text-white/90 font-bold bg-black/20 inline-block px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full backdrop-blur-sm">نسبة الإنجاز: {project.progressPct}% — آخر تحديث {getHijriDate(project.updatedAt)} هـ</div>
            </div>
            <div className="bg-white/10 p-4 rounded-xl border border-white/20 backdrop-blur-md w-full md:w-auto min-w-[280px]">
              <label className="block text-xs font-bold text-white/80 mb-2">رقم المشروع</label>
              <div className="flex flex-col gap-2">
                <input value={draftProjectId} onChange={e => setDraftProjectId(e.target.value)} disabled={isFrozen} placeholder="أدخل رقم المشروع..." className="w-full px-3 py-2 bg-black/30 border border-white/20 rounded-lg text-white font-bold outline-none focus:border-[#43bba1] transition disabled:opacity-60" />
                <div className="flex gap-2">
                  <button onClick={() => saveProjectId(false)} disabled={isFrozen || isSavingId} className="flex-1 bg-white/20 hover:bg-white/30 text-white py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs font-bold transition disabled:opacity-50">{isSavingId ? 'جاري الحفظ...' : 'حفظ'}</button>
                  <button onClick={() => saveProjectId(true)} disabled={isFrozen || isSavingId} className="flex-[2] bg-gradient-to-r from-[#43bba1] to-[#359d86] text-black py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs font-bold flex items-center justify-center gap-1.5 shadow-md disabled:opacity-50">
                    {isFrozen ? <Lock className="w-3.5 h-3.5" /> : <CheckCircle2 className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />} {isFrozen ? 'مُجمد' : 'تأكيد وتجميد'}
                  </button>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="w-full sticky top-2 z-30 mb-8 space-y-2">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-3"><FileText className="w-5 h-5 text-[#43bba1]" /><h3 className="text-lg font-bold text-white">سير العمل: <span className="text-[#a871f7]">{project.beneficiaryName}</span></h3></div>
          <div className="flex w-full h-12 md:h-14 gap-1 md:gap-1.5 bg-[#0a0a0a] p-1 rounded-lg border border-gray-800 shadow-xl flex-row-reverse">
            {[5, 4, 3, 2, 1].map((phaseNum) => (
              <div key={phaseNum} onClick={() => setActivePhase(phaseNum)} 
                className={`relative h-full rounded-md cursor-pointer overflow-hidden transition-all duration-500 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1)] 
                  ${activePhase === phaseNum ? 'flex-[4] lg:flex-[5] bg-gradient-to-l from-[#4A1F66] to-[#2c1545] border border-[#6d3bb0] shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(80,43,121,0.2)]' : 'flex-[1] bg-[#121212] border border-gray-800 hover:bg-[#1a1a1a]'}`}>
                <div className={`absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center transition-all duration-300 ${activePhase === phaseNum ? 'opacity-0 scale-50 pointer-events-none' : 'opacity-100 scale-100'}`}><span className="text-sm md:text-base font-black text-gray-500">{phaseNum}</span></div>
                <div className={`absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center w-full px-2 md:px-4 transition-all duration-500 ${activePhase === phaseNum ? 'opacity-100 scale-100' : 'opacity-0 scale-75 pointer-events-none'}`}><span className="text-[11px] sm:text-xs md:text-sm lg:text-base font-bold text-white text-center whitespace-nowrap">{(PHASE_TITLES as any)[phaseNum]}</span></div>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>

          <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2 md:gap-3 bg-[#0d0d0d]/95 backdrop-blur-md p-2 md:p-3 rounded-lg border border-gray-800 shadow-xl min-h-[50px]">
            {phaseForms[activePhase].map((form) => {
              const isCompleted = form.status === 'approved' || form.status === 'completed';
              return (
                <button key={form.id} onClick={() => { if (!unfoldedForms.includes(form.id)) toggleFormFold(form.id); setTimeout(() => { const el = document.getElementById(`workflow-form-${form.id}`); if (el) window.scrollTo({ top: el.getBoundingClientRect().top + window.scrollY - 160, behavior: 'smooth' }); }, 150); }} 
                className={`relative px-4 py-2 rounded-md text-[11px] md:text-sm font-bold flex items-center gap-2 shrink-0 border transition-all 
                  ${form.status === 'draft' ? 'text-gray-500 border-gray-800 bg-[#0a0a0a]' : isCompleted ? 'border-[#43bba1] text-[#43bba1] shadow-[0_0_12px_rgba(67,187,161,0.2)] bg-[#0c0712]' : 'border-[#a871f7] text-[#a871f7] shadow-[0_0_12px_rgba(168,113,247,0.2)] bg-[#0c0712] hover:bg-[#130a1c]'}`}>
                  {isCompleted ? <CheckCircle2 className="w-4 h-4" /> : form.status === 'draft' ? <Lock className="w-4 h-4 text-gray-600" /> : <Circle className="w-4 h-4 text-[#a871f7]" />}
                  {form.title}
                </button>
              );
            })}
            {creatableForms.map(f => (
              <button key={`create-${f.code}`} onClick={() => setCreatorCode(f.code)}
                className="relative px-4 py-2 rounded-md text-[11px] md:text-sm font-bold flex items-center gap-2 shrink-0 border border-dashed border-[#502b79] text-[#a871f7] hover:bg-[#502b79] hover:text-white transition-all bg-[#0a0a0a]">
                <Plus className="w-4 h-4" /> {f.title}
              </button>
            ))}
            {phaseForms[activePhase].length === 0 && creatableForms.length === 0 && <span className="text-xs text-gray-500 font-bold mx-auto">لا توجد نماذج في هذه المرحلة حالياً</span>}
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="flex flex-col gap-4 md:gap-6">
          {phaseForms[activePhase].map((form) => {
            const isUnfolded = unfoldedForms.includes(form.id);
            const isCompleted = form.status === 'approved' || form.status === 'completed';
            const FormComponent = RENDERERS[form.code];
            const canEdit = checkAccess(form.id, user.role as RoleKey, user.isAdmin === true);

            return (
              <div key={form.id} id={`workflow-form-${form.id}`} className={`bg-[#0c0c0c] rounded-xl flex flex-col relative transition-all duration-500 overflow-hidden border-2 ${form.status === 'draft' ? 'border-gray-800 opacity-60' : isCompleted ? 'border-[#43bba1]/50 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(67,187,161,0.1)]' : 'border-[#502b79] shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(80,43,121,0.15)]'}`}>
                <div onClick={() => toggleFormFold(form.id)} className={`w-full p-4 md:px-6 md:py-4 flex items-center justify-between gap-3 text-right bg-[#0c0712] transition-colors cursor-pointer ${isUnfolded ? 'border-b border-[#502b79]/40' : 'hover:bg-[#130a1c]'}`}>
                  <div className="flex-1 flex items-center gap-3 outline-none">
                    {isCompleted ? <CheckCircle2 className="w-5 h-5 md:w-6 md:h-6 text-[#43bba1]" /> : form.status === 'draft' ? <Lock className="w-5 h-5 md:w-6 md:h-6 text-gray-600" /> : <Circle className="w-5 h-5 md:w-6 md:h-6 text-[#a871f7]" />}
                    <h4 className={`text-base md:text-lg font-bold ${form.status === 'draft' ? 'text-gray-500' : isCompleted ? 'text-gray-300' : 'text-[#a871f7]'}`}>{form.title}</h4>
                  </div>
                  <div className={`p-1 rounded-full outline-none ${form.status === 'draft' ? 'text-gray-600' : 'text-[#a871f7]'}`}>{isUnfolded ? <ChevronUp className="w-5 h-5" /> : <ChevronDown className="w-5 h-5" />}</div>
                </div>
                <div className={`transition-all duration-500 ease-in-out bg-[#070707] ${isUnfolded ? 'opacity-100 p-4 md:p-6' : 'max-h-0 opacity-0 pointer-events-none p-0 overflow-hidden'}`}>
                  {FormComponent ? <FormComponent rec={form} user={user} api={api} users={users} context={formsContext} onClose={() => {}} /> : <div className="text-center py-10 text-gray-500 text-sm border border-dashed border-gray-800 rounded-lg">لم يتم تسجيل مكون العرض (Renderer) لهذا النموذج.</div>}
                </div>
              </div>
            );
          })}
        </div>
      </main>

      {creatorCode && (
        <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-2 sm:p-4" dir="rtl">
          <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm" onClick={() => setCreatorCode(null)} />
          <div className="relative z-10 w-full max-w-3xl max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto rounded-2xl shadow-2xl">
            {(() => {
              const CreatorComp = CREATORS[creatorCode];
              return CreatorComp ? <CreatorComp user={user} api={api} users={users} context={formsContext} onClose={() => setCreatorCode(null)} /> : <div className="bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 p-6 rounded-2xl text-center"><p className="text-red-500 font-bold">لا يوجد صانع مخصص لهذا النموذج.</p><button onClick={() => setCreatorCode(null)} className="mt-4 px-4 py-2 bg-gray-200 dark:bg-slate-800 rounded-lg">إغلاق</button></div>;
            })()}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
};
3. src/App.tsx
(محرك التفعيل التلقائي لنماذج المرحلة الثالثة F-85، F-32، F-33، F-35، F-34)

TypeScript
import React, { useState, useEffect, useRef, useMemo, useCallback } from 'react';
import {
  Bell, WifiOff, User as UserIcon, AlertTriangle, ClipboardList, CheckCircle2,
} from 'lucide-react';
import { onAuthStateChanged, signOut } from 'firebase/auth';
import {
  collection, onSnapshot, doc, updateDoc, addDoc, deleteDoc, runTransaction,
} from 'firebase/firestore';
import { auth, db } from './lib/firebase';
import { getUserProfile, AuthScreen, type UserProfile } from './components/Auth';
import { TarmeemLogo, TarmeemSplash, ThemeProvider, ThemeToggle } from './components/ui';
import {
  DashboardHome, PendingAccountScreen, DeactivatedAccountScreen,
} from './components/Home';
import {
  DEPT_PORTALS, PortalSidebar, PortalMobileNav, type ActivePortal,
} from './components/Departments';
import { AdminUsersPortal } from './components/Admin';
import { MasterProjectList, ProjectDetail } from './components/Projects';
import { EmployeeProfile } from './components/EmployeeProfile';
import {
  DEPARTMENTS, DepartmentKey, RoleKey, FORM_BY_CODE, FormCode,
  portalAccessForRole, roleName, formatProjectId, FormStatus
} from './lib/data';
import type { FormRecord, FormsApi } from './components/Forms';
import { FormDetailModal, NewFormModal } from './components/Forms';
import { RENDERERS, CREATORS, ProjectRecord, FormsContext } from './components/forms/FormRenderers';

interface AppNotification {
  id: string; text: string; subject?: string; type: string; link?: string;
  recipients: string[]; readBy: string[]; createdAt: string; meta?: any;
}

function App() {
  const [firebaseUser, setFirebaseUser] = useState<any>(null);
  const [rawUserProfile, setRawUserProfile] = useState<UserProfile | null>(null);
  const [authLoading, setAuthLoading] = useState(true);

  const [users, setUsers] = useState<UserProfile[]>([]);
  const [forms, setForms] = useState<FormRecord[]>([]);
  const [projects, setProjects] = useState<ProjectRecord[]>([]);
  const [notifications, setNotifications] = useState<AppNotification[]>([]);

  const [isOffline, setIsOffline] = useState(!navigator.onLine);
  const [active, setActive] = useState<ActivePortal>('HOME');
  const [activeProjectId, setActiveProjectId] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [activeProfileId, setActiveProfileId] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [bellOpen, setBellOpen] = useState(false);
  const bellRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
  const [openFormId, setOpenFormId] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [showNewForm, setShowNewForm] = useState(false);
  const [newFormPreselect, setNewFormPreselect] = useState<FormCode | undefined>(undefined);

  const [splashVisible, setSplashVisible] = useState(() => !sessionStorage.getItem('tarmeem_splash_seen'));
  useEffect(() => { if (!splashVisible) sessionStorage.setItem('tarmeem_splash_seen', 'true'); }, [splashVisible]);

  useEffect(() => {
    const unsub = onAuthStateChanged(auth, async (user) => {
      setFirebaseUser(user);
      if (user) {
        const profile = await getUserProfile(user.uid);
        const legacyAdmins = ['a.alkhaldi@tarmeem.org', 's.aldossari@tarmeem.org'];
        if (profile && user.email && legacyAdmins.includes(user.email.toLowerCase()) && profile.isAdmin !== true) {
          await updateDoc(doc(db, 'users', user.uid), { isAdmin: true, status: 'active' });
          setRawUserProfile({ ...profile, isAdmin: true, status: 'active' });
        } else {
          setRawUserProfile(profile);
        }
      } else {
        setRawUserProfile(null);
      }
      setAuthLoading(false);
    });
    return () => unsub();
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!firebaseUser) return;
    const unsubUsers = onSnapshot(collection(db, 'users'), (snap) => {
      const list = snap.docs.map(d => ({ id: d.id, ...d.data() } as UserProfile));
      setUsers(list);
      const me = list.find(u => u.id === firebaseUser.uid);
      if (me) setRawUserProfile(me);
    });
    const unsubForms = onSnapshot(collection(db, 'forms'), (snap) => setForms(snap.docs.map(d => ({ id: d.id, ...d.data() } as FormRecord))));
    const unsubProjects = onSnapshot(collection(db, 'projects'), (snap) => setProjects(snap.docs.map(d => ({ id: d.id, ...d.data() } as ProjectRecord))));
    const unsubNotifs = onSnapshot(collection(db, 'notifications'), (snap) => setNotifications(snap.docs.map(d => ({ id: d.id, ...d.data() } as AppNotification))));
    return () => { unsubUsers(); unsubForms(); unsubProjects(); unsubNotifs(); };
  }, [firebaseUser]);

  useEffect(() => {
    const onOnline = () => setIsOffline(false); const onOffline = () => setIsOffline(true);
    window.addEventListener('online', onOnline); window.addEventListener('offline', onOffline);
    return () => { window.removeEventListener('online', onOnline); window.removeEventListener('offline', onOffline); };
  }, []);
  
  useEffect(() => {
    const handler = (e: MouseEvent) => { if (bellRef.current && !bellRef.current.contains(e.target as Node)) setBellOpen(false); };
    document.addEventListener('mousedown', handler);
    return () => document.removeEventListener('mousedown', handler);
  }, []);

  const userProfile = useMemo(() => rawUserProfile, [rawUserProfile]);
  const isAdmin = userProfile?.isAdmin === true; 

  const deleteProject = useCallback(async (projectRefId: string) => {
    if (!isAdmin) return;
    try { await deleteDoc(doc(db, 'projects', projectRefId)); setActiveProjectId(null); } catch (e) { console.error(e); }
  }, [isAdmin]);

  const dispatchNotification = useCallback(async (n: any) => {
    try { await addDoc(collection(db, 'notifications'), { ...n, subject: n.subject || n.text.slice(0, 80), recipients: n.recipients || [], readBy: [], createdAt: new Date().toISOString(), meta: n.meta || {} }); } catch (e) { console.error(e); }
  }, []);

  const markNotificationRead = useCallback(async (notifId: string, userId: string) => {
    try {
      const notif = notifications.find(n => n.id === notifId);
      if (!notif) return;
      await updateDoc(doc(db, 'notifications', notifId), { readBy: notif.readBy.includes(userId) ? notif.readBy : [...notif.readBy, userId] });
    } catch (e) { console.error(e); }
  }, [notifications]);

  const markAllNotificationsRead = useCallback(async (userId: string) => {
    try {
      const unread = notifications.filter(n => (n.recipients || []).includes(userId) && !(n.readBy || []).includes(userId));
      for (const n of unread) await updateDoc(doc(db, 'notifications', n.id), { readBy: [...(n.readBy || []), userId] });
    } catch (e) { console.error(e); }
  }, [notifications]);

  const usersByRole = useCallback((role: RoleKey): string[] => users.filter(u => u.status === 'active' && u.role === role).map(u => u.id), [users]);
  
  const generateProjectId = useCallback(async (): Promise<{ projectId: string; serial: number }> => {
    const year = new Date().getFullYear();
    const counterRef = doc(db, 'counters', `projects-${year}`);
    const serial = await runTransaction(db, async (trx) => {
      const snap = await trx.get(counterRef);
      const next = (snap.exists() ? (snap.data().value || 0) : 0) + 1;
      trx.set(counterRef, { value: next, year }, { merge: true });
      return next;
    });
    return { projectId: formatProjectId(year, serial), serial };
  }, []);

  const createProject = useCallback(async (data: Partial<ProjectRecord>): Promise<string | null> => {
    try {
      const now = new Date().toISOString();
      const ref = await addDoc(collection(db, 'projects'), { ...data, createdAt: now, updatedAt: now, progressPct: data.progressPct || 0, phase: data.phase || 'RESEARCH' });
      await updateDoc(ref, { id: ref.id });
      return ref.id;
    } catch (e) { console.error(e); return null; }
  }, []);

  const updateProject = useCallback(async (projectRefId: string, patch: Partial<ProjectRecord>) => {
    try { await updateDoc(doc(db, 'projects', projectRefId), { ...patch, updatedAt: new Date().toISOString() }); } catch (e) { console.error(e); }
  }, []);

  const phaseTransition = useCallback((code: FormCode) => {
    switch (code) {
      case 'F-08': return { phase: 'DIAGNOSIS', progress: 25 };
      case 'F-85': return { phase: 'TENDERING', progress: 50 };
      case 'F-14': return { phase: 'EXECUTION', progress: 65 };
      case 'F-07': return { phase: 'CLOSED', progress: 100 };
      default: return null;
    }
  }, []);

  const createForm: FormsApi['createForm'] = useCallback(async (input) => {
    try {
      const def = FORM_BY_CODE[input.code];
      if (!def) return null;
      const role = input.user.role as RoleKey;
      
      const forcedStatus = input.status || 'pending';
      const startIdx = def.approvalChain[0] === role ? 1 : 0;
      const initialApprovals = startIdx === 1 ? [{ role, actorId: input.user.id, actorName: input.user.fullName, at: new Date().toISOString(), decision: 'approved' as const, note: 'إنشاء' }] : [];
      
      const rec: Omit<FormRecord, 'id'> = {
        code: def.code, title: def.title, projectId: input.projectId || null, projectRefId: input.projectRefId || null,
        beneficiaryName: input.beneficiaryName || '', status: startIdx >= def.approvalChain.length ? 'approved' : forcedStatus,
        approvalIndex: startIdx, approvalChain: def.approvalChain, approvals: initialApprovals,
        createdBy: input.user.id, createdByName: input.user.fullName, createdByRole: role,
        createdAt: new Date().toISOString(), updatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
        ownerDept: def.ownerDept, bridgesTo: def.bridgesTo || [], notes: input.notes || '', data: input.data || {},
        assigneeId: input.assigneeId || null, files: input.files || [], stepStartedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
      };
      const ref = await addDoc(collection(db, 'forms'), rec);
      await updateDoc(ref, { id: ref.id });

      if (forcedStatus === 'pending') {
        const nextRole = def.approvalChain[startIdx];
        if (nextRole) {
          const recipients = input.assigneeId ? [input.assigneeId] : usersByRole(nextRole);
          await dispatchNotification({
            text: `طلب جديد بانتظار اعتمادك: ${def.code} ${def.title}${input.beneficiaryName ? ' — ' + input.beneficiaryName : ''}`,
            subject: `${def.code} — ${def.title}`, type: 'form_pending', recipients, link: ref.id
          });
        }
      }
      return ref.id;
    } catch (e) { console.error(e); return null; }
  }, [dispatchNotification, usersByRole]);

  const activateForm = useCallback(async (formId: string, assigneeId?: string) => {
    try {
      const patch: any = { status: 'pending', stepStartedAt: new Date().toISOString() };
      if (assigneeId) patch.assigneeId = assigneeId;
      await updateDoc(doc(db, 'forms', formId), patch);
      
      const rec = forms.find(f => f.id === formId);
      if (rec) {
        const nextRole = rec.approvalChain[rec.approvalIndex];
        const finalAssignee = assigneeId || rec.assigneeId;
        const recipients = finalAssignee ? [finalAssignee] : usersByRole(nextRole);
        await dispatchNotification({
          text: `تم تفعيل طلب جديد بانتظار اعتمادك: ${rec.code} ${rec.title}`,
          subject: `${rec.code} — بانتظار الاعتماد`, type: 'form_pending', recipients, link: formId
        });
      }
    } catch (e) { console.error(e); }
  }, [forms, usersByRole, dispatchNotification]);

  const updateFormData: FormsApi['updateFormData'] = useCallback(async (formId, dataPatch) => {
    const rec = forms.find(f => f.id === formId);
    if (!rec) return;
    await updateDoc(doc(db, 'forms', formId), { data: { ...(rec.data || {}), ...dataPatch }, updatedAt: new Date().toISOString() });
  }, [forms]);

  const advanceForm = useCallback(async (formId: string, user: UserProfile, decision: 'approved' | 'rejected' | 'deferred', note?: string, dataPatch?: Record<string, any>) => {
    const rec = forms.find(f => f.id === formId);
    if (!rec) return;
    
    const now = new Date().toISOString();
    const newApproval = { role: user.role as RoleKey, actorId: user.id, actorName: user.fullName, at: now, decision, note };
    let nextStatus: FormRecord['status'] = rec.status;
    let nextIndex = rec.approvalIndex;

    if (decision === 'approved') { nextIndex = rec.approvalIndex + 1; nextStatus = nextIndex >= rec.approvalChain.length ? 'approved' : 'pending'; } 
    else if (decision === 'rejected') { nextStatus = 'rejected'; } 
    else if (decision === 'deferred') { nextStatus = 'deferred'; }

    const patch: any = { approvals: [...rec.approvals, newApproval], approvalIndex: nextIndex, status: nextStatus, updatedAt: now, stepStartedAt: now };
    if (dataPatch) { patch.data = { ...(rec.data || {}), ...(dataPatch as any) }; if (dataPatch.projectId) patch.projectId = dataPatch.projectId; if (dataPatch.projectRefId) patch.projectRefId = dataPatch.projectRefId; }
    try { await updateDoc(doc(db, 'forms', formId), patch); } catch (e) { console.error(e); return; }

    if (nextStatus === 'approved' && rec.projectRefId) {
      const t = phaseTransition(rec.code as any);
      if (t) await updateProject(rec.projectRefId, { phase: t.phase as any, progressPct: t.progress });

      // PHASE 2 TRIGGERS
      if (rec.code === 'F-08') {
        const project = projects.find(p => p.id === rec.projectRefId);
        const f20 = forms.find(f => f.code === 'F-20' && f.projectRefId === rec.projectRefId);
        const f84 = forms.find(f => f.code === 'F-84' && f.projectRefId === rec.projectRefId);
        
        if (f20) { await updateFormData(f20.id, { helpers: project?.data?.diagnosisHelpers || [] }); await activateForm(f20.id, rec.assigneeId); }
        if (f84) { await updateFormData(f84.id, { helpers: project?.data?.diagnosisHelpers || [] }); await activateForm(f84.id, rec.assigneeId); }

        if (!dataPatch?.noEvacuation && !rec.data?.noEvacuation) {
          const f18 = forms.find(f => f.code === 'F-18' && f.projectRefId === rec.projectRefId);
          const f22 = forms.find(f => f.code === 'F-22' && f.projectRefId === rec.projectRefId);
          if (f18) await activateForm(f18.id, project?.createdBy);
          if (f22) await activateForm(f22.id, project?.createdBy);
        } else {
          const f18 = forms.find(f => f.code === 'F-18' && f.projectRefId === rec.projectRefId);
          const f22 = forms.find(f => f.code === 'F-22' && f.projectRefId === rec.projectRefId);
          const skipApproval = { role: 'system' as RoleKey, actorId: 'system', actorName: 'النظام', at: new Date().toISOString(), decision: 'approved' as const, note: 'تخطي تلقائي (المبنى لا يحتاج إخلاء)' };
          if (f18) await updateDoc(doc(db, 'forms', f18.id), { status: 'completed', approvals: [skipApproval], updatedAt: new Date().toISOString() });
          if (f22) await updateDoc(doc(db, 'forms', f22.id), { status: 'completed', approvals: [skipApproval], updatedAt: new Date().toISOString() });
        }
      }

      // PHASE 3 TRIGGERS (الترسية والبدء)
      if (rec.code === 'F-84') {
        const f85 = forms.find(f => f.code === 'F-85' && f.projectRefId === rec.projectRefId);
        if (f85) await activateForm(f85.id);
      }
      
      if (rec.code === 'F-85') {
        await updateProject(rec.projectRefId, { contractorName: rec.data?.winnerContractor, awardedPrice: rec.data?.winnerPrice });
        const f32 = forms.find(f => f.code === 'F-32' && f.projectRefId === rec.projectRefId);
        if (f32) await activateForm(f32.id);
      }

      if (rec.code === 'F-32') {
        const f33 = forms.find(f => f.code === 'F-33' && f.projectRefId === rec.projectRefId);
        // F-33 is assigned specifically to the engineer chosen in F-32
        if (f33) await activateForm(f33.id, dataPatch?.engineerId || rec.data?.engineerId);
      }

      if (rec.code === 'F-33') {
        const f35 = forms.find(f => f.code === 'F-35' && f.projectRefId === rec.projectRefId);
        const f34 = forms.find(f => f.code === 'F-34' && f.projectRefId === rec.projectRefId);
        
        // Pass the supervision helpers down to the logistics form (F-34)
        const project = projects.find(p => p.id === rec.projectRefId);
        if (f34) {
          await updateFormData(f34.id, { helpers: project?.data?.supervisionHelpers || [] });
          await activateForm(f34.id, rec.assigneeId);
        }
        if (f35) await activateForm(f35.id); // Finance form
      }

      // PHASE 4 & 5 TRIGGERS
      if (rec.code === 'F-14' && rec.data?.scopeChange) {
        const f23 = forms.find(f => f.code === 'F-23' && f.projectRefId === rec.projectRefId);
        if (f23) await activateForm(f23.id);
      }

      if (rec.code === 'F-07' && rec.data?.mediaRequested) {
        const f52 = forms.find(f => f.code === 'F-52' && f.projectRefId === rec.projectRefId);
        if (f52) await activateForm(f52.id);
      }
    }
  }, [forms, projects, phaseTransition, updateProject, activateForm, updateFormData]);

  const attachFiles: FormsApi['attachFiles'] = useCallback(async (formId, files) => {
    const rec = forms.find(f => f.id === formId);
    if (!rec) return;
    await updateDoc(doc(db, 'forms', formId), { files: [...(rec.files || []), ...(files || [])], updatedAt: new Date().toISOString() });
  }, [forms]);

  const formsApi: FormsApi = useMemo(() => ({ forms, createForm, activateForm, approveForm: (id, user, note, patch) => advanceForm(id, user, 'approved', note, patch), rejectForm: (id, user, note) => advanceForm(id, user, 'rejected', note), deferForm: (id, user, note) => advanceForm(id, user, 'deferred', note), updateFormData, attachFiles }), [forms, createForm, activateForm, advanceForm, updateFormData, attachFiles]);
  
  const formsContext: FormsContext = useMemo(() => ({ projects, generateProjectId, createProject, updateProject, findProjectForm: (projectRefId, code) => formsApi.forms.find(f => f.projectRefId === projectRefId && f.code === code) || null, userById: (id) => users.find(u => u.id === id) }), [projects, generateProjectId, createProject, updateProject, formsApi.forms, users]);

  // Auth/Users Logic...
  const approveUser = useCallback(async (userId: string, edits: any, approverId: string) => { try { const existing = users.find(u => u.id === userId); await updateDoc(doc(db, 'users', userId), { ...edits, status: 'active', approvedBy: approverId, approvedAt: new Date().toISOString(), needsRoleReset: false, auditLog: [...(existing?.auditLog || []), { at: new Date().toISOString(), actor: approverId, action: 'approved' }] }); } catch (e) { console.error(e); } }, [users]);
  const updateUser = useCallback(async (userId: string, edits: any, actorId: string) => { try { await updateDoc(doc(db, 'users', userId), { ...edits }); } catch (e) { console.error(e); } }, []);
  const deactivateUser = useCallback(async (userId: string, actorId: string) => { try { await updateDoc(doc(db, 'users', userId), { status: 'deactivated', deactivatedAt: new Date().toISOString(), deactivatedBy: actorId }); } catch (e) { console.error(e); } }, []);
  const reactivateUser = useCallback(async (userId: string) => { try { await updateDoc(doc(db, 'users', userId), { status: 'active', deactivatedAt: null, deactivatedBy: null }); } catch (e) { console.error(e); } }, []);
  const rejectUser = useCallback(async (userId: string) => { try { await deleteDoc(doc(db, 'users', userId)); } catch (e) { console.error(e); } }, []);
  const resetUserRole = useCallback(async (userId: string) => { try { await updateDoc(doc(db, 'users', userId), { role: 'PENDING', department: '', isManager: false, status: 'pending', needsRoleReset: true }); } catch (e) { console.error(e); } }, []);
  const saveProfile = useCallback(async (userId: string, patch: Partial<UserProfile>) => { try { await updateDoc(doc(db, 'users', userId), patch); } catch (e) { console.error(e); } }, []);

  const allowedDepts = useMemo(() => { if (!userProfile) return []; if (isAdmin) return DEPARTMENTS.map(d => d.key); if (userProfile.role === 'PENDING') return []; return portalAccessForRole(userProfile.role as RoleKey); }, [userProfile, isAdmin]);
  const myNotifications = useMemo(() => notifications.filter(n => (n.recipients || []).includes(userProfile?.id || '')), [notifications, userProfile?.id]);
  const unreadCount = myNotifications.filter(n => !(n.readBy || []).includes(userProfile?.id || '')).length;

  if (authLoading) return <div className="min-h-screen bg-white dark:bg-slate-950 flex items-center justify-center" dir="rtl"><TarmeemLogo variant="stacked" size={60} animated={true} /></div>;
  if (!firebaseUser) return <AuthScreen onAuth={() => {}} />;
  if (userProfile && userProfile.status === 'pending') return <PendingAccountScreen email={firebaseUser.email} onSignOut={() => signOut(auth)} />;
  if (userProfile && userProfile.status === 'deactivated') return <DeactivatedAccountScreen onSignOut={() => signOut(auth)} />;

  const goToPortal = (p: ActivePortal) => { setActive(p); if (p !== 'PROJECTS_LIST') setActiveProjectId(null); if (p !== 'PROFILE') setActiveProfileId(null); };
  const openForm = (id: string) => setOpenFormId(id);
  const openProject = (id: string) => { setActiveProjectId(id); setActive('PROJECTS_LIST'); };
  const openProfile = (id: string) => { setActiveProfileId(id); setActive('PROFILE'); };
  const openCreator = (preselect?: FormCode) => { setNewFormPreselect(preselect); setShowNewForm(true); };

  const openRec = openFormId ? formsApi.forms.find(f => f.id === openFormId) || null : null;
  const activeProject = activeProjectId ? projects.find(p => p.id === activeProjectId) || null : null;
  const profileTarget = activeProfileId ? users.find(u => u.id === activeProfileId) || null : userProfile;

  const renderActive = () => {
    if (!userProfile) return null;
    if (active === 'HOME') return <DashboardHome user={userProfile} api={formsApi} projects={projects} goToPortal={(d) => setActive(d as ActivePortal)} goToProjects={() => setActive('PROJECTS_LIST')} goToProject={openProject} allowedDepts={allowedDepts} />;
    if (active === 'PROJECTS_LIST') return activeProject ? <ProjectDetail project={activeProject} user={userProfile} users={users} api={formsApi} onBack={() => setActiveProjectId(null)} onOpenForm={openForm} onDeleteProject={deleteProject} /> : <MasterProjectList user={userProfile} api={formsApi} projects={projects} users={users} onOpenProject={openProject} onCreateForm={openCreator} />;
    if (active === 'PROFILE' && profileTarget) return <EmployeeProfile profile={profileTarget} currentUser={userProfile} api={formsApi} users={users} onBack={() => { setActiveProfileId(null); if (profileTarget.id !== userProfile.id) setActive('ADMIN'); else setActive('HOME'); }} onOpenForm={openForm} saveProfile={saveProfile} />;
    if (active === 'ADMIN') return <AdminUsersPortal users={users} approveUser={approveUser} updateUser={updateUser} deactivateUser={deactivateUser} reactivateUser={reactivateUser} rejectUser={rejectUser} resetUserRole={resetUserRole} currentUser={userProfile} onOpenProfile={openProfile} />;
    const Portal = DEPT_PORTALS[active as DepartmentKey];
    if (Portal) return <Portal user={userProfile} users={users} api={formsApi} onOpenForm={openForm} onCreateForm={(c) => openCreator(c)} />;
    return null;
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen font-sans bg-[#F8F9FA] dark:bg-slate-950 transition-colors text-gray-900 dark:text-slate-100" dir="rtl">
      <style dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: `
        @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Tajawal:wght@300;400;500;700;800&display=swap');
        body, .font-sans { font-family: 'Tajawal', system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif !important; }
        .hide-scrollbar::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }
        .hide-scrollbar { -ms-overflow-style: none; scrollbar-width: none; }
      `}} />

      {splashVisible && <TarmeemSplash onComplete={() => setSplashVisible(false)} />}

      {isOffline && (
        <div className="bg-red-500 text-white text-xs font-bold py-1 text-center flex items-center justify-center gap-2 z-50">
          <WifiOff className="w-3 h-3" /> وضع عدم الاتصال
        </div>
      )}

      <header className="shadow-md bg-[#4A1F66]">
        <div className="max-w-[1600px] mx-auto px-4 py-3 flex items-center justify-between gap-3">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 text-white">
            <div className="hidden md:block cursor-pointer" onClick={() => goToPortal('HOME')}>
              <TarmeemLogo variant="horizontal" size={28} color="white" animated={false} />
            </div>
            <div className="md:hidden cursor-pointer" onClick={() => goToPortal('HOME')}>
              <TarmeemLogo variant="icon" size={28} color="white" animated={false} />
            </div>
            <div className="hidden md:block border-r border-white/20 pr-3 mr-3">
              <h1 className="text-sm font-bold leading-none text-white/90">منصة العمليات الموحّدة</h1>
              <p className="text-[10px] text-white/60 leading-none mt-1">جمعية ترميم</p>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <ThemeToggle />
            <div className="relative" ref={bellRef}>
              <button onClick={() => setBellOpen(v => !v)} className="relative p-1.5 hover:bg-white/10 rounded-lg transition">
                <Bell className="w-5 h-5 text-white" />
                {unreadCount > 0 && <span className="absolute -top-1 -right-1 min-w-[18px] h-[18px] bg-red-500 text-white text-[10px] font-bold rounded-full flex items-center justify-center px-1 border-2 border-[#4A1F66]">{unreadCount > 9 ? '9+' : unreadCount}</span>}
              </button>
              {bellOpen && (
                <div className="absolute top-full left-0 mt-2 w-80 bg-white dark:bg-slate-800 shadow-2xl rounded-xl z-50 border border-gray-200 dark:border-slate-700 overflow-hidden">
                  <div className="px-4 py-3 border-b dark:border-slate-700 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-slate-900 flex justify-between items-center">
                    <span className="font-bold text-gray-700 dark:text-slate-200 text-sm">الإشعارات ({myNotifications.length})</span>
                    {unreadCount > 0 && userProfile && <button onClick={() => markAllNotificationsRead(userProfile.id)} className="text-[10px] text-[#4A1F66] dark:text-purple-300 hover:underline font-bold">تعليم الكل كمقروء</button>}
                  </div>
                  <div className="max-h-96 overflow-y-auto">
                    {myNotifications.length === 0 ? <div className="text-center py-8 text-gray-400 dark:text-slate-500 text-xs">لا توجد إشعارات</div> : myNotifications.map(n => {
                        const isRead = (n.readBy || []).includes(userProfile?.id || '');
                        return (
                          <div key={n.id} onClick={() => { if (!isRead && userProfile) markNotificationRead(n.id, userProfile.id); if (n.link) setOpenFormId(n.link); setBellOpen(false); }} className={`px-4 py-3 border-b last:border-0 dark:border-slate-700 cursor-pointer hover:bg-gray-50 dark:hover:bg-slate-900 transition flex gap-2 ${!isRead ? 'bg-blue-50/50 dark:bg-blue-900/20' : ''}`}>
                            <div className="shrink-0 mt-0.5"><Bell className="w-4 h-4 text-gray-500" /></div>
                            <div className="flex-1 min-w-0"><div className={`text-xs leading-relaxed ${!isRead ? 'font-bold text-gray-800 dark:text-slate-100' : 'text-gray-600 dark:text-slate-400'}`}>{n.text}</div><div className="flex justify-between items-center mt-1"><span className="text-[10px] text-gray-400 dark:text-slate-500">{new Date(n.createdAt).toLocaleDateString('ar-SA')}</span></div></div>
                          </div>
                        );
                      })
                    }
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>

            <button onClick={() => goToPortal('PROFILE')} className="flex items-center gap-2 bg-white/10 border border-white/20 rounded-lg p-1.5 hover:bg-white/20 transition">
              <UserIcon className="w-4 h-4 text-white" />
              <span className="text-white font-bold text-xs">{userProfile?.fullName}</span>
            </button>
            <button onClick={() => signOut(auth)} className="text-white/60 hover:text-white text-[10px] font-bold hover:underline transition">خروج</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </header>

      <div className="max-w-[1600px] mx-auto flex">
        {userProfile && <PortalSidebar active={active} onChange={goToPortal} user={userProfile} api={formsApi} isAdmin={isAdmin} allowedDepts={allowedDepts} />}
        <main className="flex-1 px-4 py-6 pb-24 md:pb-8 min-w-0">{renderActive()}</main>
      </div>

      {userProfile && <PortalMobileNav active={active} onChange={goToPortal} isAdmin={isAdmin} allowedDepts={allowedDepts} />}

      {openRec && userProfile && <FormDetailModal rec={openRec} user={userProfile} api={formsApi} users={users} registry={RENDERERS} context={formsContext} onClose={() => setOpenFormId(null)} />}
      {showNewForm && userProfile && <NewFormModal user={userProfile} api={formsApi} users={users} context={formsContext} creators={CREATORS} preselect={newFormPreselect} onClose={() => { setShowNewForm(false); setNewFormPreselect(undefined); }} />}
    </div>
  );
}

export default function AppWithTheme() { return <ThemeProvider><App /></ThemeProvider>; }
4. src/components/forms/FormRenderers.tsx
(تم تحديث F-85 ليتصل ببيانات F-84، وبناء نماذج F-32 و F-33 حسب المواصفات المطلوبة)

TypeScript
import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import {
  X, Send, Plus, Building2, Users as UsersIcon, Home as HomeIcon, Activity,
  ClipboardList, Calculator, Trophy, ShieldCheck, Camera, Truck, ShoppingCart,
  DollarSign, Briefcase, FileSignature, AlertTriangle, CheckCircle2,
  Calendar, Lock, RefreshCcw, XCircle, ArrowLeftRight, UserCog, UserCheck, MapPin,
  ChevronUp, ChevronDown, Sofa, PenTool, Trash2
} from 'lucide-react';
import { doc, updateDoc } from 'firebase/firestore';
import { db } from '../../lib/firebase';

import { Card, Input, Select, TextArea, ReadOnlyField, FileUploader, Pill, NumberCounter, ProgressBar } from '../ui';
import { DEFAULT_LISTS, FormCode } from '../../lib/data';
import { FormCreator, FormRenderer, formAwaitsUser, FormRecord } from '../Forms';
import type { UserProfile } from '../Auth';

export interface ProjectRecord {
  id: string; projectId: string; beneficiaryName: string; city: string; neighborhood?: string;
  caseRef?: string; phase: 'RESEARCH' | 'DIAGNOSIS' | 'EVACUATION' | 'TENDERING' | 'EXECUTION' | 'HANDOVER' | 'CLOSED';
  progressPct: number; diagnosisEngineerId?: string | null; supervisingEngineerId?: string | null;
  contractorName?: string | null; awardedPrice?: number | null; createdAt: string; updatedAt: string; createdBy: string;
  data?: Record<string, any>;
}

export interface FormsContext {
  projects: ProjectRecord[];
  generateProjectId: () => Promise<{ projectId: string; serial: number }>;
  findProjectForm: (projectRefId: string | null | undefined, code: FormCode) => FormRecord | null;
  updateProject: (projectRefId: string, patch: Partial<ProjectRecord>) => Promise<void>;
  createProject: (data: Partial<ProjectRecord>) => Promise<string | null>;
  userById: (id: string) => UserProfile | undefined;
}

const FormShell: React.FC<{
  rec: FormRecord; user: UserProfile; api: any; children: React.ReactNode; approveLabel?: string; approvalSection?: React.ReactNode;
}> = ({ rec, user, api, children, approveLabel = 'اعتماد', approvalSection }) => {
  const awaitsMe = formAwaitsUser(rec, user);
  const [note, setNote] = useState('');
  const [busy, setBusy] = useState(false);
  const act = async (decision: 'approved' | 'rejected') => { setBusy(true); if (decision === 'approved') await api.approveForm(rec.id, user, note); else await api.rejectForm(rec.id, user, note); setBusy(false); };
  
  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      {children}
      {approvalSection ? approvalSection : awaitsMe && (
        <div className="border border-amber-200 dark:border-amber-800 bg-amber-50/70 dark:bg-amber-900/20 rounded-lg p-3 space-y-3">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-amber-800 dark:text-amber-300"><Activity className="w-4 h-4" /><span className="text-xs font-bold">هذا الطلب بانتظار اعتمادك</span></div>
          <TextArea label="ملاحظتك (اختياري)" rows={2} value={note} onChange={(e:any) => setNote(e.target.value)} />
          <div className="flex gap-2 flex-wrap">
            <button onClick={() => act('approved')} disabled={busy} className="flex-1 py-2 bg-green-600 text-white rounded-lg font-bold text-sm hover:bg-green-700 transition flex justify-center items-center gap-1.5"><CheckCircle2 className="w-4 h-4" /> {approveLabel}</button>
            <button onClick={() => act('rejected')} disabled={busy} className="flex-1 py-2 bg-red-600 text-white rounded-lg font-bold text-sm hover:bg-red-700 transition flex justify-center items-center gap-1.5"><XCircle className="w-4 h-4" /> رفض للتعديل</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
};

// ============================================================================
// F-02: SOCIAL RESEARCH (BIG BANG)
// ============================================================================
const F02_INIT = {
  caseRef: `CS-${Math.floor(1000 + Math.random() * 9000)}`,
  personal: { fullName: '', idNumber: '', nationality: 'سعودي', gender: 'ذكر', dob: '', mobile1: '', mobile2: '', city: '', neighborhood: '', gps: '', socialStatus: '', education: '' },
  work: { commercialReg: 'لا يوجد', currentJob: 'لا يعمل' },
  income: { socialSecurity: { exists: false, amount: '' } }, 
  debts: { car: { exists: false, amount: '' } },
  family: { wives: '', total: '', healthStatus: 'سليم', socialSecurityStatus: 'غير مسجل' },
  housing: { ownership: '', type: '', age: '', furniture: '', need: '' },
  researcher: { name: '', mobile: '', visitDate: '', opinion: '' },
  manager: { name: '', title: '', mobile: '' }, documents: [] as any[], pledge: false
};

export const F02Creator: FormCreator = ({ user, api, context, onClose }) => {
  const [data, setData] = useState<any>({ ...F02_INIT, researcher: { ...F02_INIT.researcher, name: user.fullName } });
  const [step, setStep] = useState(0);
  const [busy, setBusy] = useState(false);
  const [manualProjectId, setManualProjectId] = useState('');
  const [isProjectIdFrozen, setIsProjectIdFrozen] = useState(false);
  const [localSaveTxt, setLocalSaveTxt] = useState('');

  const update = (sec: string, key: string, value: any) => setData((d: any) => ({ ...d, [sec]: { ...d[sec], [key]: value } }));
  const handleLocalSave = (freeze: boolean) => { setIsProjectIdFrozen(freeze); setLocalSaveTxt(freeze ? 'تم التجميد' : 'تم الحفظ'); setTimeout(() => setLocalSaveTxt(''), 2000); };

  const submit = async () => {
    if (!data.pledge || !data.personal.fullName) return;
    setBusy(true);
    try {
      const projectRefId = await context.createProject({
        projectId: manualProjectId || '',
        beneficiaryName: data.personal.fullName,
        city: data.personal.city, neighborhood: data.personal.neighborhood, caseRef: data.caseRef,
        phase: 'RESEARCH', progressPct: 5, createdBy: user.id, data: { isProjectIdFrozen }
      });

      const f02Id = await api.createForm({ code: 'F-02', user, projectId: manualProjectId || '', projectRefId, beneficiaryName: data.personal.fullName, notes: data.researcher.opinion, data });

      if (f02Id) {
        // SPAWN THE ENTIRE MASTER CONTAINER ROADMAP AS DRAFTS
        const allCodes: FormCode[] = [
          'F-03.1', 'F-03.2', 'F-04', 'F-08', 
          'F-18', 'F-22', 'F-21', 'F-20', 'F-84', // Phase 2
          'F-85', 'F-32', 'F-33', 'F-35', 'F-34', // Phase 3
          'F-19', 'F-14', 'F-23', 'F-15',         // Phase 4
          'F-07', 'F-52'                          // Phase 5
        ];
        for (const code of allCodes) {
           await api.createForm({ code, user, projectId: manualProjectId || '', projectRefId, beneficiaryName: data.personal.fullName, status: 'draft' });
        }
        await api.createForm({ code: 'F-03', user, projectId: manualProjectId || '', projectRefId, beneficiaryName: data.personal.fullName, data: { f02Id }, status: 'pending' });
      }
      onClose();
    } finally { setBusy(false); }
  };

  const steps = ['شخصية', 'دخل وديون', 'الأسرة والسكن', 'الباحث والمرفقات'];

  return (
    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-2 sm:p-4" dir="rtl">
      <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-black/70 backdrop-blur-sm" onClick={onClose} />
      <div className="relative bg-[#050505] rounded-2xl shadow-2xl w-full max-w-4xl max-h-[95vh] overflow-hidden flex flex-col border border-gray-800">
        <div className="bg-gradient-to-l from-[#4A1F66] to-[#6B3D87] px-5 py-4 flex items-center justify-between text-white">
          <h2 className="font-bold">استمارة البحث الاجتماعي (F-02)</h2>
          <button onClick={onClose} className="p-1.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-white/15"><X className="w-5 h-5" /></button>
        </div>
        <div className="relative bg-gradient-to-br from-[#4A1F66] via-[#6B3D87] to-[#43bba1] p-5 text-white border-b border-[#6B3D87] shadow-sm">
           <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row items-start md:items-center justify-between gap-4">
              <div className="flex-1">
                 <h1 className="text-xl font-black mb-1">{data.personal.fullName || 'اسم المستفيد...'}</h1>
                 <p className="text-white/80 text-xs flex items-center gap-1.5"><MapPin className="w-3 h-3" /> {data.personal.city || 'المدينة...'} {data.personal.neighborhood ? `· ${data.personal.neighborhood}` : ''}</p>
              </div>
              <div className="bg-white/10 p-3 rounded-xl border border-white/20 backdrop-blur-md w-full md:w-auto min-w-[260px]">
                 <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-2">
                   <label className="text-xs font-bold text-white/80">رقم المشروع</label>
                   {localSaveTxt && <span className="text-[10px] text-[#43bba1] font-bold bg-[#05110e] px-2 py-0.5 rounded">{localSaveTxt}</span>}
                 </div>
                 <div className="flex flex-col gap-2">
                   <input value={manualProjectId} onChange={e => setManualProjectId(e.target.value)} disabled={isProjectIdFrozen} placeholder="أدخل رقم المشروع (اختياري)..." className="w-full px-3 py-1.5 bg-black/30 border border-white/20 rounded-lg text-white font-bold outline-none focus:border-[#43bba1] transition text-sm disabled:opacity-60" />
                   <div className="flex gap-2">
                     <button onClick={() => handleLocalSave(false)} disabled={isProjectIdFrozen} className="flex-1 bg-white/20 hover:bg-white/30 text-white py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs font-bold transition disabled:opacity-50">حفظ مؤقت</button>
                     <button onClick={() => handleLocalSave(true)} disabled={isProjectIdFrozen} className="flex-[2] bg-gradient-to-r from-[#43bba1] to-[#359d86] text-black py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs font-bold flex items-center justify-center gap-1.5 shadow-md disabled:opacity-50">
                       {isProjectIdFrozen ? <Lock className="w-3.5 h-3.5" /> : <CheckCircle2 className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />} {isProjectIdFrozen ? 'مُجمد' : 'تأكيد وتجميد'}
                     </button>
                   </div>
                 </div>
              </div>
           </div>
        </div>
        <div className="px-5 py-3 border-b border-gray-800 flex gap-2 overflow-x-auto bg-[#0a0a0a]">
          {steps.map((s, i) => <button key={i} onClick={() => setStep(i)} className={`flex-1 min-w-[120px] py-2 px-2 rounded-lg text-xs font-bold transition-all ${i === step ? 'bg-[#1a0f2e] text-[#a871f7] border border-[#3c1d5d]' : 'text-gray-500 hover:bg-[#111]'}`}>{i + 1}. {s}</button>)}
        </div>
        <div className="overflow-y-auto p-5 flex-1 space-y-4 text-gray-200">
          {step === 0 && (
            <div className="bg-[#0c0c0c] border border-gray-800 rounded-xl p-5">
              <h3 className="text-[#43bba1] font-bold mb-4 flex items-center gap-2"><UsersIcon className="w-5 h-5"/> البيانات الشخصية</h3>
              <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                <Input label="الاسم الرباعي *" required value={data.personal.fullName} onChange={e => update('personal', 'fullName', e.target.value)} />
                <Input label="رقم الهوية (10 أرقام) *" required value={data.personal.idNumber} onChange={e => update('personal', 'idNumber', e.target.value)} />
                <Select label="المدينة *" options={DEFAULT_LISTS.cities} value={data.personal.city} onChange={e => update('personal', 'city', e.target.value)} />
              </div>
            </div>
          )}
          {step === 3 && (
            <div className="bg-[#0c0c0c] border border-gray-800 rounded-xl p-5">
               <h3 className="text-[#43bba1] font-bold mb-4 flex items-center gap-2"><Activity className="w-5 h-5"/> الباحث الاجتماعي</h3>
               <Input label="اسم الباحث *" value={data.researcher.name} onChange={e => update('researcher', 'name', e.target.value)} />
               <TextArea className="mt-4" label="رأي الباحث في الحالة **" rows={3} value={data.researcher.opinion} onChange={e => update('researcher', 'opinion', e.target.value)} />
               <label className="flex items-center gap-2 mt-6 cursor-pointer bg-[#111] p-4 rounded-lg border border-gray-800">
                  <input type="checkbox" checked={data.pledge} onChange={e => setData((d:any) => ({...d, pledge: e.target.checked}))} className="w-5 h-5 accent-[#43bba1]" />
                  <span className="text-sm font-bold text-white">أُقرّ بصحة البيانات الميدانية والمستندات المرفقة، وبناءً عليه يتم إنشاء مسار المشروع.</span>
               </label>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
        <div className="border-t border-gray-800 p-4 flex items-center justify-between bg-[#0a0a0a]">
          <button onClick={() => setStep(s => Math.max(0, s - 1))} className="text-[#a871f7] font-bold text-sm">السابق</button>
          {step < 3 ? <button onClick={() => setStep(s => s + 1)} className="px-6 py-2 bg-[#1a0f2e] text-[#a871f7] border border-[#3c1d5d] rounded-lg text-sm font-bold">التالي</button>
          : <button onClick={submit} disabled={busy || !data.pledge} className="px-6 py-2 bg-gradient-to-r from-[#43bba1] to-[#359d86] text-black rounded-lg text-sm font-bold disabled:opacity-50 flex items-center gap-2"><Send className="w-4 h-4" /> رفع وتوليد المشروع</button>}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

// ... Renderers F-03 to F-20 omitted here for brevity as they remain perfectly as built before ...

// ============================================================================
// F-84: CONTRACTORS PRICING (PHASE 2)
// ============================================================================
export const F84Renderer: FormRenderer = ({ rec, user, api }) => {
  const [bids, setBids] = useState<{ id: number; name: string; amount: string }[]>(rec.data?.bids || [{ id: Date.now(), name: '', amount: '' }]);
  const [busy, setBusy] = useState(false);
  const [localSaveTxt, setLocalSaveTxt] = useState('');
  const awaitsMe = formAwaitsUser(rec, user);

  const handleSave = async () => {
    setBusy(true);
    await api.updateFormData(rec.id, { bids });
    setLocalSaveTxt('تم الحفظ بنجاح');
    setTimeout(() => setLocalSaveTxt(''), 2000);
    setBusy(false);
  };

  const submit = async () => {
    setBusy(true);
    await api.approveForm(rec.id, user, 'تم رفع التسعيرات المبدئية', { bids });
    setBusy(false);
  };

  return (
    <FormShell rec={rec} user={user} api={api}>
      <Card title="تسعيرات المقاولين (المبدئية)" icon={Calculator}>
        <p className="text-sm text-gray-400 mb-4 leading-relaxed">أدخل أسماء المقاولين وإجمالي عروض الأسعار المقدمة لغرض المقارنة والحصر المبدئي.</p>
        <div className="space-y-3 mb-5">
          {bids.map((bid, index) => (
            <div key={bid.id} className="flex flex-col md:flex-row gap-3 p-3 rounded-xl border bg-[#050505] border-gray-800 items-center">
              <span className="font-bold text-[#a871f7] text-sm bg-[#111] border border-gray-800 w-8 h-8 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full shrink-0 shadow-sm">{index + 1}</span>
              <Input disabled={!awaitsMe} label="اسم المقاول / المؤسسة" className="w-full md:flex-1" value={bid.name} onChange={(e:any) => setBids(bids.map(b => b.id === bid.id ? { ...b, name: e.target.value } : b))} />
              <div className="flex items-center gap-3 w-full md:w-auto md:flex-1">
                <Input disabled={!awaitsMe} label="قيمة العرض (ر.س)" type="number" className="w-full" value={bid.amount} onChange={(e:any) => setBids(bids.map(b => b.id === bid.id ? { ...b, amount: e.target.value } : b))} />
                {awaitsMe && bids.length > 1 && (
                  <button type="button" onClick={() => setBids(bids.filter(b => b.id !== bid.id))} className="mt-5 text-red-500 hover:bg-[#3a1515] p-2 rounded-lg transition-colors"><Trash2 size={18}/></button>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
        
        {awaitsMe && (
          <div className="flex flex-col gap-3">
            <button type="button" onClick={() => setBids([...bids, { id: Date.now(), name: '', amount: '' }])} className="bg-[#111] text-[#a871f7] border border-dashed border-gray-700 px-4 py-3 rounded-lg text-sm font-bold flex items-center justify-center gap-2 hover:border-[#a871f7] hover:text-white transition-colors w-full shadow-sm">
              <Plus size={18} /> إضافة عرض آخر
            </button>
            <div className="flex gap-2 mt-4 pt-4 border-t border-gray-800">
               <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col gap-1">
                 <button onClick={handleSave} disabled={busy} className="bg-[#1a1a1a] text-white py-3 rounded-xl font-bold text-sm hover:bg-[#222] transition border border-gray-700">حفظ كمسودة</button>
                 {localSaveTxt && <span className="text-[10px] text-[#43bba1] text-center font-bold">{localSaveTxt}</span>}
               </div>
               <button onClick={submit} disabled={busy} className="flex-[2] bg-gradient-to-r from-[#43bba1] to-[#359d86] text-black py-3 rounded-xl font-bold text-sm shadow-md hover:from-[#50d1b5] transition flex justify-center items-center gap-2">
                 <CheckCircle2 className="w-5 h-5"/> اعتماد التسعيرات
               </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
      </Card>
    </FormShell>
  );
};

// ============================================================================
// F-85: TENDERING AWARD (PHASE 3)
// ============================================================================
export const F85Renderer: FormRenderer = ({ rec, user, api }) => {
  const [selectedBidId, setSelectedBidId] = useState(rec.data?.selectedBidId || '');
  const [timeframe, setTimeframe] = useState(rec.data?.timeframe || '');
  const [notes, setNotes] = useState(rec.data?.notes || '');
  const [pledge, setPledge] = useState(false);
  const [busy, setBusy] = useState(false);
  const awaitsMe = formAwaitsUser(rec, user);

  // Fetch bids from F-84 to display in the dropdown
  const f84 = api.forms.find(f => f.code === 'F-84' && f.projectRefId === rec.projectRefId);
  const bids = f84?.data?.bids || [];
  const selectedBid = bids.find((b:any) => b.id.toString() === selectedBidId);

  const submit = async () => {
    if(!selectedBid) return;
    setBusy(true);
    await api.approveForm(rec.id, user, 'تمت الترسية', { 
      selectedBidId, 
      winnerContractor: selectedBid.name, 
      winnerPrice: selectedBid.amount, 
      timeframe, 
      notes 
    });
    setBusy(false);
  };

  return (
    <FormShell rec={rec} user={user} api={api}>
      <Card title="قرار الترسية واختيار العرض الأنسب" icon={Trophy}>
        <div className="bg-[#1a0f2e]/30 border border-[#3c1d5d] p-4 rounded-xl text-sm text-[#a871f7] leading-relaxed mb-5">
           بصفتك مدير المشاريع، اختر المقاول الأنسب للترسية من بين العروض المقدمة من قسم التشخيص.
        </div>
        
        <div className="space-y-4">
          <Select disabled={!awaitsMe} label="-- يرجى اختيار المقاول الفائز --" required 
            options={bids.map((b:any) => ({ value: b.id.toString(), label: `${b.name} (${b.amount} ر.س)` }))} 
            value={selectedBidId} onChange={e => setSelectedBidId(e.target.value)} />
            
          <Input disabled={!awaitsMe} label="المدة الزمنية المقترحة للتنفيذ" required value={timeframe} onChange={(e:any) => setTimeframe(e.target.value)} placeholder="مثال: 45 يوماً" />
        </div>
      </Card>

      <Card title="الاعتمادات والموافقات" icon={ShieldCheck}>
         <TextArea disabled={!awaitsMe} label="ملاحظات / توصية إضافية (مدير المشاريع)" rows={3} value={notes} onChange={(e:any) => setNotes(e.target.value)} placeholder="اكتب ملاحظاتك للاعتماد الفني والمالي هنا..." />
         
         {awaitsMe && (
           <div className="bg-[#0f0f0f] rounded-xl border border-[#43bba1]/50 p-6 mt-5 shadow-sm">
             <div className="flex items-start gap-4 mb-5 bg-[#0a0a0a] p-4 rounded-xl border border-gray-800">
               <input type="checkbox" id="pledge_85" checked={pledge} onChange={(e) => setPledge(e.target.checked)} className="w-6 h-6 mt-1 rounded accent-[#43bba1] cursor-pointer" />
               <label htmlFor="pledge_85" className="cursor-pointer select-none">
                 <h4 className="text-base font-bold text-white mb-2">إقرار وتوقيع رقمي</h4>
                 <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 font-medium leading-relaxed">أقر بصفتي مدير المشاريع بصحة الإجراءات والموافقة على الترسية للمقاول المرشح أعلاه، ليتم تحويل المحضر في سلسلة الاعتمادات.</p>
               </label>
             </div>
             <button onClick={submit} disabled={!pledge || !selectedBidId || !timeframe || busy} className={`w-full py-4 rounded-xl text-base font-bold flex items-center justify-center gap-2 transition-all shadow-md ${(pledge && selectedBidId && timeframe) ? 'bg-gradient-to-r from-[#43bba1] to-[#359d86] text-black hover:from-[#50d1b5]' : 'bg-[#111] text-gray-600 border border-gray-800 cursor-not-allowed'}`}>
               <CheckCircle2 className="w-5 h-5" /> اعتماد مدير المشاريع وتوجيهه للإدارة المالية
             </button>
           </div>
         )}
      </Card>
    </FormShell>
  );
};

// ============================================================================
// F-32: ASSIGN SUPERVISOR (PHASE 3)
// ============================================================================
export const F32Renderer: FormRenderer = ({ rec, user, api, users, context }) => {
  const [engineerId, setEngineerId] = useState(rec.data?.engineerId || '');
  const [helper1, setHelper1] = useState(rec.data?.helpers?.[0] || '');
  const [helper2, setHelper2] = useState(rec.data?.helpers?.[1] || '');
  const [helper3, setHelper3] = useState(rec.data?.helpers?.[2] || '');
  const [busy, setBusy] = useState(false);
  const awaitsMe = formAwaitsUser(rec, user);
  
  const engineers = users.filter(u => u.role === 'DIAGNOSIS_ENGINEER' && u.status === 'active');
  const allProjectMembers = users.filter(u => ROLE_BY_KEY[u.role as RoleKey]?.department === 'PROJECTS' && u.status === 'active');

  const submit = async () => {
    setBusy(true);
    const helpers = [helper1, helper2, helper3].filter(Boolean);
    await api.approveForm(rec.id, user, 'تم التكليف للإشراف', { engineerId, helpers });
    if (rec.projectRefId) {
      const project = context.projects.find(p => p.id === rec.projectRefId);
      await context.updateProject(rec.projectRefId, { supervisingEngineerId: engineerId, data: { ...project?.data, supervisionHelpers: helpers } });
      const f33 = api.forms.find(f => f.code === 'F-33' && f.projectRefId === rec.projectRefId);
      if (f33) await api.activateForm(f33.id, engineerId);
    }
    setBusy(false);
  };

  return (
    <FormShell rec={rec} user={user} api={api}>
      <Card title="توجيه الإشراف الهندسي الميداني" icon={UserCog}>
        <div className="bg-[#1a0f2e]/30 border border-[#3c1d5d] p-4 rounded-xl text-sm text-[#a871f7] leading-relaxed mb-5">
           تمت ترسية المشروع بنجاح واعتماد المقاول. يرجى الآن من (رئيس قسم الإشراف) اختيار المهندس الذي سيشرف على التنفيذ الميداني وتعيين المساعدين (الفزعة).
        </div>
        
        <div className="space-y-4">
          <Select disabled={!awaitsMe} label="اختر المهندس المشرف *" required options={engineers.map(e => ({ value: e.id, label: e.fullName }))} value={engineerId} onChange={e => setEngineerId(e.target.value)} />
          
          <div className="bg-[#111] p-4 rounded-xl border border-gray-800">
             <h4 className="text-xs font-bold text-[#43bba1] mb-3 border-b border-gray-800 pb-2">فريق الدعم والمساندة (الفزعة) - اختياري</h4>
             <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-3">
               <Select disabled={!awaitsMe} label="مساعد 1" options={allProjectMembers.map(e => ({ value: e.id, label: e.fullName }))} value={helper1} onChange={e => setHelper1(e.target.value)} />
               <Select disabled={!awaitsMe} label="مساعد 2" options={allProjectMembers.map(e => ({ value: e.id, label: e.fullName }))} value={helper2} onChange={e => setHelper2(e.target.value)} />
               <Select disabled={!awaitsMe} label="مساعد 3" options={allProjectMembers.map(e => ({ value: e.id, label: e.fullName }))} value={helper3} onChange={e => setHelper3(e.target.value)} />
             </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {awaitsMe && (
          <div className="mt-6 border-t border-gray-800 pt-5 text-right">
             <button disabled={!engineerId || busy} onClick={submit} className="w-full md:w-auto px-8 py-3.5 rounded-xl text-sm font-bold text-black bg-gradient-to-r from-[#43bba1] to-[#359d86] hover:from-[#50d1b5] transition-all disabled:opacity-50 shadow-md">تكليف المهندس المشرف الفعلي</button>
          </div>
        )}
      </Card>
    </FormShell>
  );
};

// ============================================================================
// F-33: START DOCUMENTATION (PHASE 3)
// ============================================================================
export const F33Renderer: FormRenderer = ({ rec, user, api }) => {
  const [date, setDate] = useState(rec.data?.date || '');
  const [pledge, setPledge] = useState(false);
  const [busy, setBusy] = useState(false);
  const awaitsMe = formAwaitsUser(rec, user);

  const submit = async () => {
    setBusy(true);
    await api.approveForm(rec.id, user, 'تم توثيق البدء', { date });
    setBusy(false);
  };

  return (
    <FormShell rec={rec} user={user} api={api}>
      <Card title="التوثيق الميداني لبدء العمل" icon={Activity}>
        <div className="bg-[#111] p-5 rounded-xl border border-gray-800 mb-5">
           <p className="text-sm text-gray-300 leading-relaxed font-medium">بصفتك المهندس المشرف، هل تؤكد أن المقاول قد استلم الموقع فعلياً وبدأ في أعمال الترميم، وتم التأكد من جاهزية الموقع وخلوه من العوائق؟</p>
        </div>
        <div className="w-full md:w-1/2">
           <Input disabled={!awaitsMe} label="تاريخ بدء الأعمال الفعلي في الموقع *" type="date" required value={date} onChange={(e:any) => setDate(e.target.value)} />
        </div>
      </Card>
      
      {awaitsMe && (
        <div className="bg-[#0f0f0f] rounded-xl border border-[#43bba1]/50 p-6 shadow-sm">
          <div className="flex items-start gap-4 mb-5 bg-[#0a0a0a] p-4 rounded-xl border border-gray-800">
            <input type="checkbox" id="pf33" checked={pledge} onChange={(e) => setPledge(e.target.checked)} className="w-6 h-6 mt-1 rounded accent-[#43bba1] cursor-pointer" />
            <label htmlFor="pf33" className="cursor-pointer select-none">
              <h4 className="text-base font-bold text-white mb-2">توثيق بدء العمل رسمياً</h4>
              <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 font-medium leading-relaxed">أقر بأن العمل قد بدأ فعلياً في الموقع في التاريخ المحدد أعلاه.</p>
            </label>
          </div>
          <button onClick={submit} disabled={!pledge || !date || busy} className={`w-full py-4 rounded-xl text-base font-bold flex items-center justify-center gap-2 transition-all shadow-md ${(pledge && date) ? 'bg-gradient-to-r from-[#43bba1] to-[#359d86] text-black hover:from-[#50d1b5]' : 'bg-[#111] text-gray-600 border border-gray-800 cursor-not-allowed'}`}>
            <CheckCircle2 className="w-5 h-5" /> توثيق البدء وانتقال المشروع لمسار التنفيذ
          </button>
        </div>
      )}
    </FormShell>
  );
};

// ============================================================================
// F-35: FIRST PAYMENT REQUEST (PHASE 3) - SKELETON
// ============================================================================
export const F35Renderer: FormRenderer = ({ rec, user, api }) => {
  const awaitsMe = formAwaitsUser(rec, user);
  return (
    <FormShell rec={rec} user={user} api={api}>
      <Card title="طلب دفعة أولى للمقاول" icon={DollarSign}>
        <div className="p-10 text-center text-gray-500 border border-dashed border-gray-800 rounded-xl">
           [سيتم بناء تفاصيل وحقول طلب الدفعة لاحقاً بناءً على توجيهاتك]
        </div>
      </Card>
    </FormShell>
  );
};

// ============================================================================
// F-34: MATERIAL INVENTORY TRANSFER (PHASE 3) - SKELETON
// ============================================================================
export const F34Renderer: FormRenderer = ({ rec, user, api }) => {
  const awaitsMe = formAwaitsUser(rec, user);
  return (
    <FormShell rec={rec} user={user} api={api}>
      <Card title="إحالة حصر المواد للبدء بالتوريد" icon={ClipboardList}>
        <div className="p-10 text-center text-gray-500 border border-dashed border-gray-800 rounded-xl">
           [سيتم بناء تفاصيل نموذج إحالة حصر المواد لاحقاً بناءً على توجيهاتك]
        </div>
      </Card>
    </FormShell>
  );
};

// ... Renderers F-14 to F-52 omitted here as they remain perfectly as built before ...
